title: Shu Dao: A Calligraphy Score Framework Linking Calligraphy, Music, and Performance
summary:
This paper introduces Calligraphy Writing Score Representation (CWSR) and proposes Shu Dao as a framework that interprets East Asian calligraphy as a performative art rather than a static visual artifact. Inspired by traditions such as Japanese Shodō and embodied cultural practices such as Chadao , the framework models calligraphy as a structured performance analogous to musical notation.
  Instead of representing characters as fixed images, the proposed approach encodes each brush stroke as an ordered and executable action, forming a calligraphy score. Characters are organized within a structured spatial grid, and strokes are annotated with attributes including stroke type, execution order, spatial coordinates, trajectory, compositional role, and dynamic properties such as brush pressure and pacing. This representation captures temporal and expressive aspects of calligraphic writing that are typically absent from image-based representations.
  The paper makes three main contributions. First, it introduces CWSR as a structured notation system for representing calligraphy across multiple levels, including strokes, character structures, and compositional organization (e.g., layout and zhangfa), together with their rhythmic and performative dynamics. Second, it conceptualizes Shu Dao as a score-mediated framework that models calligraphy as structured performance. Third, it establishes a computational foundation for the analysis, visualization, and executable generation of calligraphic works by AI-based calligraphic agents.
  Together, these contributions bridge calligraphy, musical notation, and performative cultural practices, supporting human--AI co-creation in computational calligraphy and digital humanities research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出书法书写分数表示法（CWSR）和“书道”框架，将东亚书法从静态视觉作品重新定义为可执行的表演艺术，类似音乐记谱法，支持人机共创。
AI.motivation: 传统书法研究将作品视为静态图像，忽略了书写过程中的时间性、动态性和表现力。受日本书道和茶道等具身文化实践的启发，作者希望建立一种能捕捉笔触执行顺序、节奏和动态属性的表示方法。
AI.method: 提出CWSR结构化符号系统，将每个笔画编码为有序可执行动作，包含笔触类型、执行顺序、空间坐标、轨迹、构图角色以及笔压和节奏等动态属性，并组织在结构化空间网格中。基于此构建“书道”框架，将书法建模为分数介导的表演。
AI.result: 实现了三方面贡献：1) CWSR多层级表示系统（笔画、字结构、章法布局及其节奏动态）；2) “书道”作为分数介导的表演框架；3) 为AI书法智能体进行分析、可视化和可执行生成的计算基础。
AI.conclusion: 该框架连接了书法、音乐记谱和表演文化实践，为人机协同的计算书法和数字人文研究奠定了基础。

title: BitsMoE: Efficient Spectral Energy-Guided Bit Allocation for MoE LLM Quantization
comment: 29 pages, 6 figures, 9 tables. Code and models are available at https://github.com/zjiayu064/BitsMoE
summary: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) large language models reduce per-token computation through sparse expert activation, but their deployment remains memory-intensive because all expert weights must be kept resident in memory. Existing MoE compression methods struggle in the ultra-low-bit regime: pruning irreversibly removes model capacity, while coarse-grained quantization fails to allocate bits according to heterogeneous expert and weight-direction importance. We propose BitsMoE, a spectral-energy-guided bit-allocation framework for MoE LLM quantization. BitsMoE decomposes each MoE layer by SVD into a shared basis and expert-specific spectral factors, retaining the shared basis without quantization to preserve common cross-expert structure and using the expert-specific factors as fine-grained quantization units. To determine the bit-width of each unit, BitsMoE formulates spectrum-wise mixed-precision quantization as an activation-aware reconstruction surrogate and solves an integer linear program that minimizes estimated reconstruction loss under a fixed bit budget. Experiments across multiple MoE LLMs show that BitsMoE substantially reduces downstream task accuracy degradation in ultra-low-bit regimes. Under 2-bit quantization on Qwen3-30B-A3B-Base, BitsMoE accelerates quantization by 12.3$\times$, improves average accuracy by 27.83 percentage points, and increases decoding speed by 1.76$\times$ over GPTQ. Our model and code are publicly available at https://github.com/zjiayu064/BitsMoE.

AI.tldr: BitsMoE提出了一种基于谱能量引导的比特分配框架，通过SVD分解和混合精度量化，在超低位宽下显著提升MoE大模型的压缩效果和推理效率。
AI.motivation: 现有的MoE压缩方法在超低位宽下表现不佳：剪枝会不可逆地移除模型容量，而粗粒度量化无法根据专家和权重方向的重要性分配比特，导致内存占用仍然过高。
AI.method: BitsMoE通过SVD将每个MoE层分解为共享基（不量化，保留跨专家通用结构）和专家特定的谱因子（作为细粒度量化单元）；然后基于激活感知的重建代理，构建整数线性规划来求解混合精度量化的最优比特宽度分配。
AI.result: 在Qwen3-30B-A3B-Base上，2比特量化相比GPTQ加速量化12.3倍，平均准确率提升27.83个百分点，解码速度提升1.76倍。
AI.conclusion: BitsMoE在超低位宽下显著降低了MoE大模型下游任务的精度损失，同时提升了量化和推理速度。

title: Position Paper: Post-Solve Robustness in Decision Engines: Feasible Regions and Smoothness Under Perturbations
summary: Mixed-Integer Linear Programming (MILP) decision engines routinely output nominally optimal plans for high-stakes industrial systems. Yet deployment rarely matches solve-time assumptions: small perturbations in costs, demands, or resource availability can invalidate feasibility or trigger discontinuous shifts to qualitatively different solutions. We argue that this post-solve robustness gap is a missing layer in today's optimization pipelines and a missing evaluation dimension for learning-enabled decision systems. Rather than replacing robust optimization or stochastic programming, the proposed layer audits a solved incumbent and returns solver-backed evidence about how far that solution can be trusted. We formalize two central objects: (i) an $ε$-near-optimal feasible neighborhood in parameter space, capturing when an incumbent remains feasible and near-optimal under perturbations, and (ii) solution smoothness in decision space, capturing whether nearby alternatives with small combinatorial edits remain competitive. We then synthesize the most relevant partial answers from sensitivity and stability analysis, robust optimization, neighborhood search, adversarial testing, and learning-based enhancements, and articulate an agenda for a unified post-solve robustness layer. Concretely, we call for certified inner approximations around the incumbent, probabilistic robustness estimation with calibrated uncertainty, adversarial robustness margins, and learning-based prediction and explanation aligned with solver-backed verification. We conclude with a compact reporting template and evaluation protocol that would make robustness a first-class output of decision engines.

AI.tldr: 本文指出现有MILP决策引擎存在"求解后鲁棒性差距"，并提出在传统优化流程中增加一个审计层，用于评估已求解的可行解在参数扰动下的鲁棒性，包括ε-近优可行邻域和解平滑度两个核心概念，并整合了敏感性分析、鲁棒优化、邻域搜索、对抗测试和基于学习的增强方法，最终呼吁将鲁棒性作为决策引擎的一等输出。
AI.motivation: MILP决策引擎在工业高风险系统中输出名义最优方案，但实际部署中成本、需求或资源可用性的微小扰动可能导致方案不可行或解发生不连续剧烈变化，现有的优化流程缺乏对求解后方案鲁棒性的系统评估。
AI.method: 提出一个后求解鲁棒性审计层，形式化定义了两个核心对象：(i) ε-近优可行邻域（参数空间中保持可行且近优的区域），(ii) 解平滑度（决策空间中具有小组合编辑的邻近替代方案的竞争力）。综合了敏感性分析、稳定性分析、鲁棒优化、邻域搜索、对抗测试和基于学习的方法，并给出了统一的报告模板和评估协议。
AI.result: 提出了围绕已求解可行解的认证内逼近、带校准不确定性的概率鲁棒性估计、对抗鲁棒性边界，以及与求解器验证对齐的基于学习的预测和解释方法。
AI.conclusion: 呼吁将鲁棒性作为决策引擎的一等输出，并提供了简洁的报告模板和评估协议，以弥合求解后鲁棒性差距。

title: DAStatFormer: A Hybrid Multibranch Transformer with Statistical Feature Integration for DAS-Based Pattern Recognitions
summary: Distributed Acoustic Sensing (DAS) enables large-scale monitoring through optical fibers, but its high dimensionality and complex spatio-temporal patterns make event classification demanding. Existing deep learning approaches-CNNs, recurrent models, and Transformer variants-either fail to capture long-range dependencies or require processing raw DAS matrices at prohibitive cost. We propose DAStatFormer, a hybrid multibranch Transformer that combines compact multidomain statistical features with Gated Transformer Networks. Instead of raw signals, we extract 24 ANOVA-selected attributes per channel from the temporal, waveform, and spectral domains, reducing data size by orders of magnitude while preserving discriminative information. Each domain is processed via dedicated step-wise and channel-wise attention branches, fused by an adaptive gating mechanism. Experiments on the open $Φ$-OTDR benchmark and a real-scenario DAS dataset show that DAS-tatFormer achieves up to 99.4% accuracy and near-perfect real-world performance, while using significantly fewer parameters and lower inference cost than models such as DASFormer and DeepViT. These results demonstrate its suitability for scalable, real-time DAS-based monitoring. We release our code at https://github.com/MichelD-git/DAStatFormer

AI.tldr: 本文提出DAStatFormer，一种混合多分支Transformer架构，通过提取多域统计特征（时域、波形、频域的24个ANOVA筛选特征）代替原始DAS信号，结合门控注意力机制，在降低计算成本的同时实现高达99.4%的分类准确率，适用于大规模实时DAS监测。
AI.motivation: DAS数据维度高、时空模式复杂，现有深度学习方法（CNN、RNN、Transformer变体）要么无法捕获长距离依赖，要么处理原始DAS矩阵计算成本过高，亟需一种高效且可扩展的事件分类方法。
AI.method: 提出DAStatFormer混合多分支Transformer架构：1）从时域、波形、频域每个通道提取24个ANOVA筛选的统计特征，大幅降低数据量；2）每个域通过专用步态注意力（step-wise）和通道注意力（channel-wise）分支处理；3）采用自适应门控机制融合多分支特征。
AI.result: 在公开Φ-OTDR基准和真实DAS数据集上，DAStatFormer达到99.4%准确率，接近完美真实世界性能，参数量和推理成本显著低于DASFormer、DeepViT等模型。
AI.conclusion: DAStatFormer证明了基于统计特征替代原始信号进行DAS事件分类的有效性，为大规模实时DAS监测提供了一种高效可行的方案，代码已开源。

title: Emergent Collaborative Deliberation in Multi-Model AI Systems: A BFT-Derived Protocol for Epistemic Synthesis
summary: We present the Consilium Protocol, a Byzantine Fault Tolerance-derived architecture for structured multi-model AI deliberation that treats inter-model disagreement as epistemic signal rather than error. The protocol assigns engineered cognitive personas to language models -- separating what a model is from how it reasons -- and introduces an In-Sample/Out-of-Sample validation framework adapted from quantitative finance to distinguish training-data consensus from empirically grounded conclusions. Across 1,478 deliberation sessions spanning 32 topics in 10 domain categories, we demonstrate that (1) the cognitive persona, not the underlying model, determines epistemic behavior: free edge-inference models costing 0.0002 USD per batch produced comparable analytical output to frontier models costing 10.69 USD; (2) RLHF alignment training creates measurable, domain-specific epistemic blind spots -- contested policy topics exhibit 12.3 percentage points less adversarial challenge than settled science topics, and AI safety topics show asymmetric bias ($Δ$=11.6%) where models challenge claims that AI is dangerous far more vigorously than claims that AI risk is overstated; (3) the protocol exhibits no directional bias of its own (immigration $Δ$=2.3%, renewables $Δ$=1.2%); and (4) out-of-sample evidence retrieval validated 239 claims with 100% evidence retrieval and surfaced 167 blind-spot discoveries invisible to training-data deliberation. Run-to-run reproducibility across randomized model$\times$persona assignments averages $\pm$2.2% standard deviation. Total cost for the complete battery including all overhead: 217 USD. We release the protocol specification under MIT license to enable independent verification.

AI.tldr: Consilium协议是一种基于拜占庭容错架构的多模型AI deliberation系统，将模型间分歧视为认知信号而非错误。通过赋予模型认知人格（区分"模型是什么"与"如何推理"），并引入金融领域的样本内/样本外验证框架，以总计217美元的成本在1478轮讨论中取得了与前沿模型相当的推理效果，并揭示了RLHF对齐训练导致的认知盲区。
AI.motivation: 现有AI系统在多方讨论中将模型间的分歧视为错误或噪声，缺乏结构化方法来区分训练数据共识与经验证据支持的结论。同时，RLHF对齐训练可能引入系统性认知偏差，但缺乏量化评估方法。
AI.method: (1) 基于拜占庭容错架构的多模型讨论协议；(2) 为模型分配认知人格（区分模型能力与推理方式）；(3) 引入In-Sample/Out-of-Sample验证框架（借鉴量化金融）区分训练数据共识与经验结论。
AI.result: (1) 认知人格而非底层模型决定认知行为，低成本模型($0.0002/批)产出与前沿模型($10.69)相当；(2) RLHF导致领域特定认知盲区（争议政策话题挑战度低12.3%%，AI安全话题非对称偏差11.6%）；(3) 协议本身无定向偏差；(4) 样本外检索100%验证239项主张，发现167个盲区；可重复性标准差±2.2%；总成本217美元。
AI.conclusion: 该协议提供了量化评估AI认知行为、发现对齐训练偏差的经济有效方法，并通过MIT开源许可发布以支持独立验证。

title: Hoeffding Concept Bottleneck Models with Applications to Overhead Images
summary: Explainability of deep learning algorithms is critical for computer-vision applications with high-stake decisions. Concept bottleneck models (CBM) have recently shown promising performance to provide explainable and accurate predictions for classification problems, based on a bottleneck of high-level concepts. Existing CBM methods rely on a linear aggregation of the concept scores to compute predictions. However, a large number of concepts is often used in this linear approach, which undermines explainability and favors information leakage. In general, the underlying relation between concepts and output logits is not linear. Therefore, we introduce Hoeffding Concept Bottleneck Models (HCBM), which build on the Hoeffding functional decomposition of gradient-boosted trees to provide non-linear and sparse aggregations of concept scores, and generate compact predictions using prime implicants. HCBM are proved to be robust to interconcept leakage, and outperform standard linear CBM in practice, as shown in extensive experiments. Beyond classification, HCBM can be adapted to object detection, and we focus on a challenging case with overhead images to show the high performance of HCBM in these settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Hoeffding概念瓶颈模型（HCBM），利用梯度提升树的Hoeffding函数分解来实现非线性且稀疏的概念聚合，解决了传统线性CBM可解释性差和信息泄露的问题，在分类和检测任务上均优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有概念瓶颈模型（CBM）采用线性聚合方式处理大量概念，导致可解释性下降且容易发生信息泄露；同时，概念与输出logits之间的真实关系往往是非线性的，线性模型不足以刻画这种复杂关系。
AI.method: 基于Hoeffding函数分解对梯度提升树进行分解，实现非线性和稀疏的概念分数聚合；使用素蕴含项（prime implicants）生成紧凑预测。
AI.result: HCBM对概念间泄漏具有鲁棒性，在大量实验中优于标准线性CBM；此外，该方法可扩展到目标检测任务，在遥感图像等具有挑战性的场景中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 非线性稀疏聚合比传统线性聚合更能有效利用概念分数，提升可解释性与性能；HCBM在分类和检测任务中均展现出优势。

title: Deliberative Curation: A Protocol for Multi-Agent Knowledge Bases
comment: 29 pages, 1 figure, 6 tables. Open-source implementation available at https://github.com/StevenJohnson998/AIngram
summary:
As AI agents transition from isolated tools to collaborative participants in shared knowledge ecosystems, governing collective knowledge curation becomes a critical challenge. Human platform governance mechanisms do not transfer directly: agent statelessness undermines deterrence-based sanctions, model homogeneity violates independence assumptions underlying crowd wisdom, and sycophancy collapses deliberative consensus.
  We propose a deliberative curation protocol combining three governance layers: (1) a knowledge artifact lifecycle formalized as a labeled transition system; (2) reputation-weighted deliberative voting integrating Beta Reputation with EigenTrust amplification; and (3) graduated sanctions adapted for stateless agents, including broken agent handling distinguishing malfunction from adversarial behavior.
  We evaluate the protocol through agent-based simulation with 100 agents across seven behavioral archetypes under two adversity scenarios (30 seeds, paired t-tests). The protocol trades modest precision under benign conditions for substantially better resilience under adversity: 0.826 vs 0.791 for majority vote under moderate adversity (p<0.001), widening to 0.807 vs 0.740 under stress (p<0.001). The protocol degrades roughly three times more slowly than majority vote. Ablation analysis identifies commit-reveal vote concealment as the most impactful single component (8.2-8.6pp precision improvement, p<0.001), outperforming reputation weighting and deliberation combined. Graduated sanctions were not exercised in simulation and remain empirically unvalidated.

AI.tldr: 针对AI代理在共享知识生态中的集体知识策展问题，本文提出了一个结合知识工件生命周期、声誉加权审议投票和渐进式制裁三层治理的审议性策展协议，通过智能体模拟验证其在对抗环境下比多数投票机制具有更强的韧性。
AI.motivation: AI代理正从孤立工具向共享知识生态中的协作参与者转变，但人类平台的治理机制（如威慑制裁、群体智慧所需独立性假设、协商共识）无法直接迁移到代理系统中，需要设计专门适用于AI代理的集体知识策展治理协议。
AI.method: 提出三层治理协议：(1)知识工件生命周期，形式化为标记迁移系统；(2)声誉加权审议投票，结合Beta声誉与EigenTrust放大；(3)针对无状态代理的渐进式制裁，含故障与对抗行为的区分处理。通过100个智能体、7种行为原型、两种对抗场景的模拟实验评估。
AI.result: 协议在良性条件下精度略低，但在对抗环境下韧性显著更好：中等对抗下0.826 vs 0.791（多数投票），压力下0.807 vs 0.740（p<0.001），退化速度约为多数投票的三分之一。消融实验显示承诺-揭示投票隐藏机制最为关键（8.2-8.6pp精度提升），渐进式制裁在模拟中未被触发。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的审议策展协议为AI代理集体知识治理提供了可行方案，在对抗场景下显著优于传统多数投票机制，但渐进式制裁的有效性仍需进一步实证验证。

title: From Demonstrations to Rewards: Test-Time Prompt Optimization for VLM Reward Models
summary: Reinforcement learning relies on accurate reward functions, which are often hand-crafted or even unavailable in real-world applications, such as robotics. Recent work has explored the zero-shot reasoning capabilities of pre-trained Vision-Language Models (VLMs) as reward models. However, without careful prompt engineering, these approaches tend to produce suboptimal rewards, where false positive predictions can severely degrade downstream policy learning. In robotics, limited datasets comprising expert demonstrations are often collected to bootstrap policy learning. This scenario provides an opportunity to optimize a reward model prior policy training. We propose Demo2Reward a test-time adaptation technique to optimize the language instruction of a reward model based on a few demonstrations (3-10 trajectories) to reduce false positives while preserving true positives. Crucially, this requires no additional model training or computation resources during policy learning. We show that Demo2Reward consistently outperforms existing zero- and few-shot VLM reward models across a range of simulated robotic tasks and policy backbones. Finally, we demonstrate that Demo2Reward effectively transfers to a real-world robotic learning scenario, enabling policy learning without manually engineering a reward function.

AI.tldr: Demo2Reward提出了一种测试时适应技术，仅需少量专家演示（3-10条轨迹）即可优化VLM奖励模型的语言指令，从而减少误报、保留正确奖励，无需额外训练或计算资源即可提升机器人策略学习效果。
AI.motivation: 现实机器人应用中奖励函数常难以获取，现有零样本VLM奖励模型存在虚假正例预测问题，会严重降低下游策略学习质量。
AI.method: 提出Demo2Reward，一种基于少量专家演示的测试时适应技术，通过优化VLM奖励模型的语言指令来减少假正例、保留真正例，无需额外模型训练或计算资源。
AI.result: 在多个模拟机器人任务和策略骨干上，Demo2Reward一致优于现有零样本和少样本VLM奖励模型，并在真实机器人学习场景中成功应用。
AI.conclusion: Demo2Reward能有效利用少量演示数据优化VLM奖励模型，无需手动设计奖励函数即可实现机器人策略学习，具有实际应用价值。

title: Agents on a Tree: Pathwise Coordination for Multi-Objective Molecular Optimization
summary: Multi-objective molecular optimization requires searching vast chemical spaces under conflicting objectives, where early design decisions strongly constrain downstream outcomes. Existing methods typically rely on a single policy or fixed scalarization, which limits their ability to represent diverse trade-offs and to explore multiple promising design trajectories. We propose ATOM, a multi-agent framework that formulates molecular optimization as a tree-structured search. Each node corresponds to an atomic operation and hosts an agent specialized for a particular objective or decision context. Agents coordinate along different paths of the tree rather than enforcing a global consensus, enabling the method to maintain and compare alternative molecular evolution trajectories. A global memory of past optimization behaviors further supports balanced exploration and exploitation across objectives. This tree-structured interaction enables reasoning over long-horizon dependencies inherent in molecular design. Experiments on challenging multi-objective benchmarks involving activity, synthesizability, and ADMET-related properties show that ATOM consistently achieves improved Pareto coverage and hypervolume over strong baselines. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of pathwise multi-agent coordination for molecular optimization. Code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/ATOM-41CE.

AI.tldr: ATOM是一个多智能体框架，将分子优化建模为树状搜索，每个节点对应原子操作并由专门智能体负责，通过路径协调实现多目标分子优化，在活性、可合成性、ADMET相关性质等基准测试上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有分子优化方法依赖单一策略或固定标量化，难以表示多样化的权衡关系，也无法探索多个有前景的设计轨迹，早期设计决策会强烈约束下游结果。
AI.method: 提出ATOM多智能体框架：将分子优化构建为树结构搜索，每个节点对应原子操作并部署专门针对特定目标或决策上下文的智能体；智能体沿树的不同路径协调而非强制全局共识；维护全局记忆以平衡跨目标的探索与利用。
AI.result: 在涉及活性、可合成性和ADMET相关性质的多目标基准测试中，ATOM consistently实现了更优的Pareto覆盖率和超体积指标。
AI.conclusion: 路径式多智能体协调在分子优化中有效，能够推理分子设计中的长期依赖关系。

title: A Shared Valence Axis Across Modern LLMs and Human EEG: The Saturation Regularity
summary:
Large language models (LLMs) have emerged as powerful representation learners whose internal features increasingly align with human cognition. We study whether modern LLMs can serve as a lens for understanding neural representations in the human brain, focusing on emotional valence in EEG.
  We first build a one-dimensional valence direction, the V-axis, from modern LLMs using only nine emotion-evocative sentences. We validate it through zero-shot transfer to sentiment benchmarks and cross-model consistency across fourteen LLMs. We then show that this LLM-derived direction maps onto human neural activity. On a public EEG cohort of 123 subjects watching affective videos, a single linear projection on EEG features tracks the V-axis position of each stimulus. Moreover, 36 EEG emotion classifiers trained without exposure to the V-axis spontaneously rediscover the same direction in their internal representations, suggesting that the same valence structure emerges in both language models and human electrophysiology.
  Yet this convergence does not provide an effective training signal. We test twenty-five alignment strategies, including knowledge distillation, representational similarity, contrastive, and topographic losses; none improve decoding, and sixteen significantly reduce accuracy. We formalize this result as the saturation regularity: once task labels alone drive a brain-decoding network onto the target direction, additional supervision mainly distorts an already-saturated basin, while the load-bearing within-class residual receives little useful gradient.
  This regularity also indicates where improvement should come from: the residual subspace unreachable by supervision. Motivated by this insight, we ensemble across residual diversity rather than supervising the basin, improving balanced accuracy by 10.5% over the prior best on FACED, with the same effect replicated on SEED-V.

AI.tldr: 论文发现大语言模型中的情感效价方向与人类EEG神经表征高度一致，但直接用这种对齐信号训练脑解码器会饱和甚至损害性能；通过残差多样性集成方法，在FACED数据集上平衡准确率提升了10.5%。
AI.motivation: 探索现代大语言模型能否作为理解人脑神经表征（特别是EEG中的情感效价）的透镜，并验证语言模型内部表征与人脑电生理活动之间的对齐程度。
AI.method: 从9个情感唤起句子构建V轴（效价方向），通过零样本迁移和跨14个LLM的一致性验证；在123名受试者的公共EEG数据集上进行线性投影映射；测试25种对齐策略（知识蒸馏、表征相似性、对比学习、拓扑损失等）；提出残差多样性集成方法。
AI.result: LLM衍生的V轴能映射到人类神经活动；36个未经V轴暴露的EEG情绪分类器自发学习到相同方向；25种对齐策略无一提升解码性能，16种显著降低准确率；残差多样性集成在FACED上提升平衡准确率10.5%，在SEED-V上复现相同效果。
AI.conclusion: 提出饱和规律（saturation regularity）：任务标签驱动脑解码网络到达目标方向后，额外监督会扭曲已饱和的盆地，而类内残差接收不到有效梯度；改进应来自监督不可达的残差子空间，而非继续对齐已有方向。

title: Optimal Transport-based Permutation-Invariant Bayesian Optimization of Offshore Wind Farm Layouts
summary: Bayesian Optimization (BO) is widely and successfully adopted for solving optimization problems having an expensive-to-evaluate, black-box, and non-convex objective function. However, the vanilla BO algorithm is not able to exploit possible symmetries characterizing the target problem. An intuitive case is given by optimal location problems, whose decision variables refer to a finite set of points within a continuous space, with the order of points not affecting the value of the objective function. We refer to this setting as optimization over layouts to distinguish from optimization over point-clouds where, instead, the order of points counts. As an instance of optimization over layouts we consider a real-life industrial-relevant application, that is the optimization of the layout of an offshore wind farm: given identical wind turbines, switching any pair of them has not any effect on the annual energy production. Based on Optimal Transport theory, we propose a Permutation-Invariant BO approach, namely PIBO, proved to provide better wind farm layouts when compared to the vanilla BO approach while cutting computation time roughly in half.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于最优输运理论的排列不变贝叶斯优化方法（PIBO），用于解决布局优化问题（如海上风电场布局），相比传统贝叶斯优化，能利用问题的排列对称性，获得更优解且计算时间减半。
AI.motivation: 标准贝叶斯优化无法利用目标问题中可能存在的对称性（如布局优化中决策变量的排列顺序不影响目标函数值），导致效率低下。
AI.method: 基于最优输运理论，提出排列不变贝叶斯优化（PIBO）方法，使优化过程能够感知并利用问题的排列对称性。
AI.result: PIBO相比传统贝叶斯优化能获得更好的海上风电场布局，同时计算时间大约减少一半。
AI.conclusion: 排列不变性设计能有效提升贝叶斯优化在布局类问题上的性能与效率。

title: Automatically Differentiable Nonlinear Tensor Networks (ADNTNs) for Exponential Compression of Deep Neural Networks
comment: 6 figure, 28 pages, to be submitted to Journal and confrence
summary:
We study Automatically Differentiable Nonlinear Tensor Networks (ADNTNs), a family of structured weight generators whose compact core tensors are trained end-to-end by reverse-mode automatic differentiation (AD). The approach can be viewed as a natural extension of low-rank adaptation and tensor factorisation: instead of using one low-rank matrix update, an ADNTN builds a large weight tensor through a hierarchy of small cores, nonlinear activations, and optional lateral mixing tensors. The paper focuses on three architectures: Tree Tensor Networks (TTNs), augmented TTNs (aTTNs) with boundary disentanglers, and Multi-scale Entanglement Renormalisation Ansatze (MERA).
  The formulation supports nonlinear activations, task-aware objectives, batching, and hardware-aware execution schedules. At the same time, the paper keeps a clear distinction between \emph{differentiating} a contraction program and making contraction free: AD does not remove the cost of large intermediates, poor contraction orders, or exact contraction of general loopy tensor networks.
  Extensive simulations on AlexNet and VGG-16 layers show per-layer compression ratios from roughly $2000\times$ to $77000\times$ in the studied settings, with accuracy often matching the dense baseline and, in several VGG-16 cases, improving it. These results are encouraging rather than final: they suggest that ADNTNs are a promising, mathematically structured, and hardware-aware route toward much smaller neural networks, provided that optimisation, contraction schedules, and deployment kernels are designed together.

AI.tldr: 本文提出自动可微非线性张量网络（ADNTNs），一种通过反向模式自动微分端到端训练的紧凑核张量结构权重生成器，在AlexNet和VGG-16上实现2000倍至77000倍的单层压缩，精度与密集基线相当甚至更优。
AI.motivation: 现有低秩适应和张量分解方法通常使用单一低秩矩阵更新，表达能力有限。本文旨在设计一种更具表达力、结构化的权重生成框架，通过张量网络层次化结构实现极端压缩，同时保持可微性以支持端到端训练。
AI.method: 提出ADNTNs框架，包括三种架构：树张量网络（TTN）、带边界解缠的增强TTN（aTTN）和多尺度纠缠重整化拟设（MERA）。通过小核张量、非线性激活和可选横向混合张量层次化构建大权重张量，支持反向模式自动微分、批处理和硬件感知执行调度。
AI.result: 在AlexNet和VGG-16层上的仿真显示，每层压缩比约2000倍至77000倍，精度通常与密集基线持平，在多个VGG-16案例中甚至有所提升。
AI.conclusion: ADNTNs是一种有前景、数学结构清晰且硬件感知的神经网络压缩路径，但需要优化、收缩调度和部署内核协同设计才能发挥最大潜力，目前的结果是鼓舞人心的而非最终结论。

title: MindGames Arena Generalization Track: In2AI Solution with Delayed Per-Step Reward Attribution
comment: 18 pages, 2 figures, 9 tables. Technical report. First place in both Open and Efficient tracks of MindGames Arena Generalization Track at NeurIPS 2025
summary: Training language model agents for multi-agent strategic interaction presents a core difficulty: the quality of any action may depend on future events that never materialize, on moves that violate game rules, or on decisions made by other players. Standard reinforcement learning assumes that rewards can be assigned at each step, but this assumption fails in settings where outcomes are entangled across time and agents. We introduce delayed per-step reward attribution with eligibility gating, an episode lifecycle and postprocessing pipeline that computes rewards only at episode end, propagates them back to originating steps according to task-specific semantics, and excludes steps that lack valid dependent information from training. Together with asynchronous rollout generation via vLLM's continuous batching, curriculum-based opponent sampling, and multi-level stratified batch construction, this approach enables stable, sample-efficient RL training in multi-agent environments. We evaluate on the MindGames Arena benchmark at NeurIPS 2025, where a single 8-billion-parameter open-source model trained with our method matched or surpassed substantially larger proprietary systems, including GPT-5, in head-to-head play and took first place in both the Open (unrestricted) and Efficient (<=8B parameters) tracks.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种针对多智能体环境下语言模型强化学习训练的新方法，通过延迟每步奖励归因、资格门控、异步推理生成和课程对手采样等技术，使得80亿参数的开源模型在MindGames Arena基准上超越了GPT-5等超大商用系统，并夺得双赛道冠军。
AI.motivation: 标准强化学习假设每步都能分配奖励，但在多智能体战略交互中，行动质量依赖于未来未发生的事件、违反游戏规则的行动或其他玩家的决策，导致奖励在时间和智能体之间纠缠不清，传统方法无法有效处理。
AI.method: 提出延迟每步奖励归因与资格门控（Delayed per-step reward attribution with eligibility gating），在回合结束时统一计算奖励并按任务语义回溯到原始步骤，过滤掉缺乏有效依赖信息的步骤；结合vLLM连续批处理的异步回合生成、课程式对手采样和多级分层批次构建。
AI.result: 在NeurIPS 2025的MindGames Arena基准上，单个80亿参数的开源模型在正面交锋中匹配或超越了包括GPT-5在内的更大规模商用系统，并在Open（无限制）和Efficient（<=8B参数）两个赛道中均获得第一名。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的训练方法能够稳定高效地训练多智能体环境中的语言模型智能体，显著缩小开源模型与超大商用模型之间的差距，证明了在受限参数规模下实现顶级多智能体博弈性能的可行性。

title: Foundation-Preserving Adaptation via Generalized Rayleigh-Quotient Optimization
summary: While finetuning effectively adapts foundation models to specialized downstream tasks, it can degrade nontarget capabilities acquired during pretraining. Existing forgetting aware methods typically seek safer updates through specialized initialization or fixed constraints, but do not regulate the adaptation preservation trade-off during training. We propose Foundation Preserving LoRA (FoLoRA), a forgetting aware optimization framework. Guided by a first order preservation condition, FoLoRA defines a forgetting penalty over pretraining-proxy activations and a task utility over downstream task activations. It then scores update directions by task utility per unit forgetting penalty via a generalized Rayleigh quotient. The resulting spectral coordinate system enables direction wise gated Adam updates, attenuating low utility to penalty directions during training. To estimate the forgetting penalty, FoLoRA constructs pretraining proxy calibration data by sampling from the pretrained model rather than relying on a single proxy dataset. Experiments on math, code, and instruction following adaptation show that FoLoRA achieves the strongest preservation adaptation balance over baselines, improving target task performance with best aggregate preservation of non target capabilities.

AI.tldr: FoLoRA是一种基于遗忘感知优化的微调框架，通过广义瑞利商评分更新方向，结合方向门控Adam更新，在保持预训练能力的同时提升下游任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有遗忘感知方法（如特殊初始化或固定约束）无法在训练过程中动态调节适应性与保留性之间的权衡，导致非目标能力退化。
AI.method: 提出遗忘惩罚项和任务效用项，通过广义瑞利商计算单位遗忘惩罚下的任务效用评分，构建谱坐标系统实现方向门控Adam更新；同时从预训练模型中采样构建校准数据以估计遗忘惩罚。
AI.result: 在数学、代码和指令跟随任务上，FoLoRA相比基线方法实现了最优的保留性与适应性平衡，在提升目标任务性能的同时最好地保留非目标能力。
AI.conclusion: FoLoRA通过动态调节更新方向有效缓解了微调中的灾难性遗忘问题，为遗忘感知微调提供了新的优化框架。

title: Universal Quantum Transformer
summary: Classical continuous-space neural networks fundamentally struggle to lock into exact mathematical symmetries, such as modular arithmetic and non-commutative algebra. To approximate these discrete logical rules, they often rely on massive parameter scaling, resulting in stochastic instability even after delayed generalization phenomena known as grokking. Here, we introduce the Universal Quantum Transformer (UQT), a fundamentally novel, quantum-native computing architecture that uses the physical properties of multi-qubit systems as a universal inductive bias for exact mathematical and algebraic reasoning. Rather than translating classical neural mechanisms, our framework relies entirely on parameterized geometric phase embedding and $SU(2)$ wave-interference. We demonstrate that the quantum attention circuit, operating on a highly compact 5-qubit substrate, perfectly learns two highly distinct formal classes: cyclic modular arithmetic ($\mathbb{Z}_{11}$) and non-Abelian algebra (the $S_4$ permutation group). While classical attention-based networks exhibit stochastic instability at convergence, the UQT achieves mathematically exact, deterministic generalization. We refer to this phenomenon as crystallization: a step beyond the well-known phenomenon of grokking. Crucially, this framework yields massive computational and memory advantages by theoretically bypassing the quadratic bottleneck of classical self-attention, and by logarithmically compressing the required representation dimension to eliminate the massive over-parameterization inherent to classical networks. Finally, we deploy this architecture on noisy intermediate-scale quantum (NISQ) hardware, proving its viability on current IBM Quantum computers. These results establish parameterized quantum topology as a universally superior physical substrate for exact artificial intelligence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通用量子变换器（UQT），一种基于多量子比特系统物理特性的量子原生计算架构，利用参数化几何相位嵌入和SU(2)波干涉实现精确的数学和代数推理。在5量子比特的紧凑系统上，UQT完美学习了循环模算术(Z₁₁)和非阿贝尔代数(S₄置换群)，实现了"结晶化"——超越经典grokking现象的确定性泛化，并在当前IBM量子计算机上验证了可行性。
AI.motivation: 经典连续空间神经网络难以锁定精确的数学对称性（如模算术和非交换代数），依赖大规模参数缩放来近似离散逻辑规则，导致随机不稳定性和grokking现象后的延迟泛化问题。
AI.method: 提出Universal Quantum Transformer (UQT)，完全依赖参数化几何相位嵌入和SU(2)波干涉，利用多量子比特系统的物理性质作为通用归纳偏置，设计量子注意力电路在紧凑的5量子比特基板上运行。
AI.result: UQT在两种高度不同的形式类（循环模算术Z₁₁和S₄置换群）上实现精确、确定性的泛化（结晶化）；理论上绕过经典自注意力的二次瓶颈，将表示维度对数压缩，消除经典网络的过度参数化；在NISQ硬件上验证了可行性。
AI.conclusion: 参数化量子拓扑被确立为用于精确人工智能的普遍优越物理基底，超越了经典神经网络在数学推理上的根本局限。

title: UF-AMA: A unified framework for cross-domain emotion recognition via adaptive multimodal alignment
summary: In recent years, emotion recognition based on physiological signals such as electroencephalogram (EEG) has gained considerable attention, as internal physiological data offer greater objectivity and reliability compared to external behavioral data like facial expressions. However, due to distribution shifts caused by individual and contextual differences, along with variations in sample quality across modalities, constructing a cross-domain multimodal emotion recognition model with high generalization and robustness remains a key challenge. In this study, we propose a Unified Framework with Adaptive Multimodal Alignment (UF-AMA) to address cross-subject and cross-session emotion recognition using multimodal physiological signals. First, we construct a cross-modal feature fusion network comprising Transformer encoders and multi-head cross-attention modules, enabling the deep integration of EEG signals and eye-tracking data. Subsequently, we introduce a confidence-aware screening mechanism that dynamically assesses the predictive reliability of each modality branch on target domain samples, partitions samples into different quality subsets, and accordingly applies global consistency alignment and cross-modal distillation. Finally, we propose a multi-level domain adaptation framework that jointly optimizes the marginal and conditional distributions of both local modality-specific and global fusion features, thereby reducing cross-domain distribution shifts at multiple granularities. Extensive experiments on the SEED and SEED-IV datasets demonstrate that UF-AMA achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance in both cross-subject and cross-session tasks. The source code is available at: https://github.com/BetterCoderLab/UF-AMA.

AI.tldr: 提出统一自适应多模态对齐框架(UF-AMA)，通过跨模态特征融合、置信度感知筛选和多级域自适应，解决跨被试和跨session的多模态生理信号情绪识别问题，在SEED和SEED-IV数据集上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 生理信号情绪识别中，个体差异和情境差异导致分布偏移，且多模态样本质量不一，构建高泛化性和鲁棒性的跨域多模态情绪识别模型是当前关键挑战。
AI.method: 1) 基于Transformer编码器和多头交叉注意力的跨模态特征融合网络；2) 置信度感知筛选机制，动态评估各模态预测可靠性并分质量子集处理；3) 多级域自适应框架，联合优化局部模态特定和全局融合特征的边缘与条件分布。
AI.result: 在SEED和SEED-IV数据集上，跨被试和跨session任务均达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: UF-AMA通过自适应多模态对齐有效缓解了跨域分布偏移问题，为多模态生理信号情绪识别提供了鲁棒的通用框架。

title: World Models: A Comprehensive Survey of Architectures, Methodologies, Reasoning Paradigms, and Applications
summary: World models, internal simulators that learn the structure and dynamics of an environment, have emerged as a central paradigm in the pursuit of artificial general intelligence, enabling agents to predict, plan, and reason within learned representations. Despite rapid progress across reinforcement learning, robotics, autonomous driving, and video generation, the field lacks a unified framework integrating its diverse architectural choices, training methods, reasoning mechanisms, and application settings. This survey addresses that gap with a multi-axis taxonomy organized along four dimensions: (i) architecture, encompassing representation format, dynamics formulation, input modality, learning paradigm, and downstream application; (ii) methodological family, including state-space and recurrent approaches, transformer-based models, diffusion-based generators, physics-informed networks, and language-augmented multimodal systems; (iii) reasoning strategy, covering imagination-based planning, latent policy learning, counterfactual reasoning, and planning under uncertainty; and (iv) application domain, spanning robotics, autonomous driving, video prediction, multimodal agents, reinforcement learning, scientific modeling, medical imaging, educational measurement, and business and finance. Tracing the field from early cognitive-science foundations to milestone systems such as PlaNet, the Dreamer family, MuZero, Sora, Cosmos, and Genie, we examine how these dimensions interact and highlight the recent convergence of chain-of-thought reasoning with world-model imagination. We review evaluation protocols and benchmarks, identify persistent challenges such as compounding prediction errors, sim-to-real transfer, and fragmented evaluation, and outline future directions toward unified multimodal world models, foundation-scale interactive simulators, and safe deployment in safety-critical domains.

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了世界模型领域的研究进展，提出了一个多轴分类法，涵盖架构、方法家族、推理策略和应用领域四个维度，并讨论了未来发展方向。
AI.motivation: 世界模型领域虽然发展迅速，但缺乏统一的框架来整合其多样化的架构选择、训练方法、推理机制和应用场景，本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 提出了一个四维度的多轴分类法：(i)架构，(ii)方法家族，(iii)推理策略，(iv)应用领域；并梳理了从早期认知科学基础到PlaNet、Dreamer、MuZero、Sora等里程碑系统的发展脉络。
AI.result: 揭示了各维度之间的相互作用，指出了持续存在的主要挑战：复合预测误差、仿真到现实迁移、碎片化评估，以及思维链推理与世界模型想象力的融合趋势。
AI.conclusion: 未来方向包括统一多模态世界模型、基础规模交互式模拟器，以及在安全关键领域的可靠部署。

title: Grokers: Bottom-Up Inductive Comprehension and Write-Time Intelligence over Typed Knowledge Graphs
comment: 6 pages; second in a series with the Magarshak Machine / SPACER paper and the Context paper
summary: We present Grokers, an architecture for building persistent, structured comprehension of typed knowledge graphs through bottom-up inductive traversal of dependency subgraphs. Unlike retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), which pays full comprehension cost at every query, Grokers pushes intelligence to write time: autonomous Groker agents analyze nodes in a typed stream graph, extract structured attributes via governed language model (LM) calls, and inductively compose that understanding upward through dependency relations, writing enriched typed attributes that serve all future queries at zero additional LM cost. We prove three formal properties: (1) the Byte-Identity Theorem, establishing that context blocks assembled from a transactionally-maintained denormalization index are byte-identical across LM turns between semantic changes, enabling KV-cache hit rates approaching 100%; (2) the Accumulation Monotonicity Theorem, establishing that the fraction of interactions resolved without LM calls is non-decreasing in the number of completed interactions under a governed wisdom library growth protocol; and (3) the Dual-Traversal Ordering Theorem, establishing that top-down generation and bottom-up comprehension are the unique correct traversal orderings for their respective tasks over a dependency DAG, and that their composition closes into a complete generation-comprehension cycle. We further present a deterministic alternative to embedding-based semantic search, with a synonym caching protocol whose LM fallback rate converges to zero for finite-vocabulary domains. A reference implementation is provided in the open-source Qbix / Safebox / Safebots stack.

AI.tldr: Grokers是一种通过自底向上归纳遍历依赖子图来构建持久、结构化知识图谱理解的架构。与RAG不同，Grokers在写入时完成智能分析，使得后续查询无需额外LM调用成本。
AI.motivation: 传统RAG方法每次查询都需要完整支付理解成本，效率低下。Grokers旨在将智能推向写入阶段，通过一次分析使得所有未来查询受益，消除重复LM调用开销。
AI.method: Groker代理自主分析流式图中的节点，通过受控LM调用提取结构化属性，并沿依赖关系自底向上归纳组合理解。采用事务性维护的反规范化索引组装上下文块，以及确定性同义词缓存协议替代嵌入向量语义搜索。
AI.result: 证明了三个定理：字节同一性定理（上下文块在语义变化间字节一致，KV缓存命中率接近100%）、累积单调性定理（无LM调用的交互比例随已完成交互数非递减）、双遍历序定理（自顶向下生成与自底向上理解是依赖DAG上各自任务的唯一正确遍历序）。同义词缓存协议的LM回退率在有限词汇域中收敛到零。
AI.conclusion: Grokers提供了一种高效的替代RAG的架构，通过在写入阶段完成理解成本，实现零额外LM成本的未来查询，并具有形式化的理论保证。

title: On Effectiveness and Efficiency of Agentic Tool-calling and RL Training
summary: Tool-calling is a central component of modern large language model (LLM) agents, equipping them with skills beyond their parametric knowledge. This paper studies tool-calling along two complementary axes: effectiveness, i.e., how this capability is measured, and efficiency, i.e., how it is learned. On effectiveness, we systematically analyze tool-calling evaluation pipelines and show that results can be highly sensitive to seemingly minor, often undocumented implementation choices including the random seed, system prompt, multi-turn template construction, and how prior interaction/reasoning history is carried forward. These choices can lead to substantial differences in reported performance, especially in multi-turn settings where without rigorous standardization, leaderboard rankings are unreliable. On efficiency, we examine standard reinforcement learning (RL) for tool-calling and identify two sources of computational waste: (i) during rollouts, many prompts produce no learning signal, and (ii) during policy updates, optimization incurs high computational cost. Guided by these findings, we introduce two techniques that accelerate RL-based tool-calling training, achieving substantial wall-clock speedup without degrading performance.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了LLM智能体的工具调用能力，发现评估管道对实现细节高度敏感导致排名不可靠，同时识别出RL训练中的计算浪费，并提出两种加速技术。
AI.motivation: 现有工具调用评估存在隐含实现依赖导致结果不稳定，且RL训练效率低下，缺乏系统性分析。
AI.method: 沿有效性和效率两个维度分析：有效性上系统评估不同实现选择的影响；效率上分析RL训练浪费来源并提出两种加速技术。
AI.result: 评估结果对随机种子、系统提示、多轮模板等高度敏感；RL训练在rollout和策略更新阶段存在计算浪费；加速技术实现显著提速且不降性能。
AI.conclusion: 需要标准化评估流程，所提加速技术可有效提升工具调用RL训练效率。

title: Product-Aware Deep Autoencoders for Robust Process Monitoring in Multi-Product Cyber-Physical Systems
summary: As Industry 4.0 accelerates the integration of Cyber-Physical Systems (CPS) in manufacturing, robust anomaly detection has become critical for ensuring process safety and security. Current data-driven approaches typically employ "product-agnostic" or global models trained on the aggregate of all normal operating data. However, modern industrial facilities frequently operate under diverse product grades. While computationally simple, these global models inherently expand their decision boundaries to accommodate the variance of multiple modes, creating a "blind spot" where subtle anomalies or targeted cyber-physical attacks may be masked by the wide acceptance region of the model. In this work, we first demonstrate that the vulnerability described above is present in global-agnostic models operating across multiple product grades. We then present a Product-Aware Autoencoder as a principled mitigation that restricts the learning domain to grade-specific distributions. While this approach reduces the identified blind-spot risk, we do not claim it as the optimal mitigation among all possible alternatives. We rigorously validate this approach against a Global Agnostic baseline using the Extended Tennessee Eastman Process (TEP) benchmark. Our empirical results indicate that the Product-Aware framework performs comparably to the global baseline on standard detection metrics, while offering improved robustness to product-grade-specific operating modes. Most critically, stress tests simulating our hypothetical attack scenarios reveal that while the global model fails to detect operational deviations in 77.8% of the scenarios, the product-aware system achieves 100% detection accuracy. These findings suggest that, in flexible manufacturing environments, generalized anomaly detectors can pose non-trivial security risks, motivating a shift toward mode-aware diagnostic architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文指出，工业4.0中传统"产品无关"的全局异常检测模型在多产品制造场景下存在安全盲区，提出了一种"产品感知自编码器"方法，将学习域限制在特定产品级分布上。实验表明，该方法在标准检测指标上与全局模型相当，但在模拟攻击场景中，全局模型77.8%的偏差无法被检测，而产品感知系统达到100%检测准确率。
AI.motivation: 传统全局异常检测模型在多产品制造场景下，由于要适配多种操作模式，决策边界会被扩大，形成"盲区"，导致细微异常或网络物理攻击无法被有效检测。
AI.method: 提出Product-Aware Autoencoder（产品感知自编码器），将学习域限制在特定产品级别的分布上，而非聚合所有正常操作数据进行全局训练。
AI.result: 在扩展的Tennessee Eastman Process基准测试中，产品感知方法与全局基线在标准检测指标上表现相当。但在模拟攻击的压力测试中，全局模型在77.8%的场景下未能检测到偏差，而产品感知系统实现了100%的检测准确率。
AI.conclusion: 在柔性制造环境中，通用异常检测器存在不容忽视的安全风险，应当转向模式感知的诊断架构。

title: Generative AI and Digital Ecosystem Resilience: A Proactive Lifecycle-Based Survey
comment: 14 pages, 3 figures, 3 tables. Accepted for publication in IEEE Access (May 2026)
summary: The proliferation of adversarial synthetic content, accelerated by Generative AI (GenAI) is rendering traditional reactive detection methods ineffective. This survey synthesizes emerging research to demonstrate a paradigm shift toward the proactive detection of emerging inauthentic narratives. In this survey, we adopt a unified, lifecycle-based taxonomy to combine socio-technical lifecycle models of adversarial campaigns with advanced computational methodologies for emerging inauthentic narrative detection. By structuring the analysis around the C5 Interaction Model (Context, Causes, Content, Cycle of Amplification, Consequences), we integrate different research streams from machine learning and social science. To differentiate spread patterns of synthetic amplification from authentic baseline traffic, this paper surveys state-of-the-art techniques for modeling the creation, seeding, and propagation of fresh narratives, including the analysis of Coordinated Inauthentic Behavior (CIB), epidemiological modeling, and Hawkes process. This survey also provides a systematic review of proactive detection methods for adversarial threats at different stages in the C5 interaction model, specifically, anomaly detection in high-dimensional embedding spaces, unsupervised coordination detection on multi-layer graphs, and agentic AI systems. Finally, this survey addresses challenges posed by GenAI, including the difficulty of tracking rapidly changing threats and multi-level distributional drift, and it outlines a future research agenda focused on detecting anomalous clusters and building anticipatory and resilient systems. This survey provides a comprehensive, lifecycle-based review of methods for the proactive detection of emerging synthetic threats for more resilient information ecosystems.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了从传统被动检测转向主动检测新兴虚假叙事的研究范式变革，基于C5交互模型（情境、原因、内容、放大循环、后果）的生命周期框架，整合了机器学习与社会科学方法，系统梳理了对抗性合成内容的主动检测技术（包括高维嵌入异常检测、多层图协调检测、智能体AI系统），并讨论了生成式AI带来的挑战及未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI（GenAI）加速了对抗性合成内容的扩散，传统的被动检测方法已难以应对，亟需转向主动检测新兴虚假叙事的范式。
AI.method: 采用统一的基于生命周期的分类法（C5交互模型），综合社会技术生命周期模型与先进计算方法，从情境、原因、内容、放大循环、后果五个维度整合机器学习和社会科学研究流，系统梳理了创建、播种和传播新叙事的技术，包括协调不真实行为（CIB）分析、流行病学建模和霍克斯过程。
AI.result: 系统综述了C5模型各阶段的主动检测方法：高维嵌入空间异常检测、多层图上的无监督协调检测、以及智能体AI系统，并识别了GenAI带来的主要挑战：快速变化的威胁追踪困难和多层级分布漂移。
AI.conclusion: 提出了未来研究议程，聚焦于检测异常集群和构建具有预见性与韧性的信息系统，以实现更具弹性的信息生态。

title: On the evolution of the concept of probability as a mirror of the evolution of reason
summary: Over the centuries, probability theory has grown from the calculus of games of chance into a central framework for reasoning under uncertainty. This article interprets that evolution not merely as a mathematical history, but as a transformation of rationality itself. From Pascal and Fermat's combinatorial symmetry to the inductive logic of Bayes and Laplace, from Poisson's statistics of events to Kolmogorov's axiomatic formalization, probability progressively incorporated uncertainty, time, and coherence into scientific judgment. This trajectory reaches a mature epistemological form in modern Bayesian inference, especially in Tarantola's view of probability as a logic of information, where prior knowledge and data are combined coherently. Yet this framework also exposes a limit: probability quantifies uncertainty about well-defined propositions, but does not by itself formalize the vagueness of the concepts used to describe them. The article therefore examines how rationality extends beyond probability. Fuzzy logic is presented as a rigorous language for graded meaning and qualitative judgment, while deep learning is analyzed as a distinct, powerful mode of prediction based on geometric interpolation and optimization rather than explicit inference. By situating probability, fuzzy logic, and deep learning in a common historical and epistemological perspective, the article clarifies their roles and limits. It argues that contemporary scientific rationality cannot be reduced to data-driven performance alone, but requires the explicit articulation of uncertainty, vagueness, and inference.

AI.tldr: 本文追溯了概率论从博弈计算到不确定性推理框架的演变，将其解读为理性本身的变革。文章对比了概率论、模糊逻辑与深度学习三种范式，指出当代科学理性不能仅依赖数据驱动，还需明确表达不确定性、模糊性和推理过程。
AI.motivation: 作者试图从认识论角度重新解释概率论的发展历史，指出其从博弈计算演变为现代不确定性推理框架的过程实质上是理性概念的变革。同时，作者希望揭示概率论的局限性——它能量化关于明确定义命题的不确定性，却无法形式化概念本身的模糊性，从而需要探讨超越概率的理性形式。
AI.method: 采用历史与认识论分析的方法，梳理概率论从帕斯卡和费马、贝叶斯和拉普拉斯、泊松到科尔莫戈罗夫公理化的演进脉络，特别聚焦于塔兰托拉将概率视为信息逻辑的贝叶斯观点。随后将概率论与模糊逻辑（作为分级意义的形式语言）和深度学习（基于几何插值与优化的预测模式）进行对比分析。
AI.result: 概率论、模糊逻辑和深度学习在历史和认识论视角下各有其角色与局限：概率论处理关于明确定义命题的不确定性，模糊逻辑处理概念本身的模糊性，深度学习则提供基于几何插值的强大预测能力，三者不可相互替代。
AI.conclusion: 当代科学理性不能简化为数据驱动的性能表现，必须同时明确包含不确定性、模糊性和推理过程的显式表达。理性是一种多元的、需要不同形式化工具共同支撑的认知能力。

title: A Four-Tier Communication Architecture and Sim-to-Real Validation of a Graphical Open-Source Platform for Robotic Engineering Education
comment: 4 pages, 4 figures, accepted as a Work-in-Progress (WiP) paper, on the 24th IEEE International Conference on Industrial Informatics (INDIN), 26-29 July, 2026, Melbourne, Australia
summary: The persistent challenge in scaling authentic manipulator education within university laboratories is a structural dichotomy: commercial digital twins are often cost-prohibitive and rigidly scripted, whereas open-source robotics middleware (ROS) imposes steep technical and syntax barriers for novices. To resolve this logistical and educational friction, this Work-in-Progress (WiP) paper proposes a scalable four-tier communication architecture tailored for sustainable robotic curricula. Rather than focusing on software application design, our study examines the underlying data exchange mechanisms required to bridge visual conceptual environments with physical robotic endpoints, utilizing the Graphical Open-Source Platform (GOSP) as a foundational instantiation. This WiP details the framework's technical integration of 3D visual armature modeling with a robust ROS middleware backend, emphasizing the serialization, routing, and encapsulation of intricate communication routines. Preliminary sim-to-real validation using multi-axis spatial trajectories confirms that encapsulating these communication pipelines provides a sufficient fidelity hardware-agnostic pathway. By bridging virtual design and physical execution, this architectural blueprint offers a viable infrastructure for engineering education.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可扩展的四层通信架构，利用图形化开源平台（GOSP）桥接虚拟设计与物理机器人执行，解决高校机械臂教育中商业数字孪生成本高、ROS门槛高的问题。
AI.motivation: 高校机器人实验室中，商业数字孪生工具成本高且脚本僵化，而开源ROS中间件对初学者技术门槛过高，存在结构性的教学摩擦，亟需一种低成本、易上手且可持续的机器人教育基础设施。
AI.method: 提出一种可扩展的四层通信架构，基于图形化开源平台（GOSP）实现3D视觉臂架建模与ROS中间件后端集成，重点设计数据序列化、路由和封装机制，通过多轴空间轨迹的sim-to-real验证评估通信管道的保真度。
AI.result: 初步的sim-to-real验证表明，封装后的通信管道能够提供足够保真度的硬件无关通路，成功弥合了虚拟设计与物理执行之间的鸿沟。
AI.conclusion: 该架构蓝图可作为工程教育的可行基础设施，为可持续机器人课程提供低成本、硬件无关的解决方案。

title: Geometric Erasure by Contrastive Velocity Matching in Rectified Flows
summary: While the rapid adoption of multimodal generative models offers immense potential, it has also increased the risks of harmful content synthesis, deepfakes, and copyright infringements. To address these challenges, concept erasure has emerged as a prospective safeguard. However, as the field gradually transitions from U-Net-based diffusion models to Rectified Flow Transformers, erasure research has struggled to keep pace. In this work, we introduce GEM, a simple but highly effective erasure framework for Rectified Flow models. As part of our contribution, we establish a principled bridge between trajectory-based unlearning grounded in Generative Flow Networks and classic teacher-guided erasure: we translate trajectory-based signals into a teacher-guided flow-matching setup that unifies the strengths of both paradigms. Concretely, a teacher provides complementary attraction and repulsion signals that we combine into a single geometric guidance objective, yielding targeted suppression of unwanted concepts while preserving benign generation.

AI.tldr: 提出GEM框架，通过将生成流网络中的轨迹级信号转化为教师引导的流匹配设置，实现对Rectified Flow Transformer模型中不需要概念的擦除，同时保持良性生成能力。
AI.motivation: 多模态生成模型的快速普及带来了有害内容合成、深度伪造和版权侵权等风险。概念擦除作为安全防护手段，但现有研究未能跟上从U-Net扩散模型向Rectified Flow Transformer的转变。
AI.method: 建立轨迹级遗忘与经典教师引导擦除之间的桥梁，将生成流网络中的轨迹信号转化为教师引导的流匹配设置，通过几何引导目标整合教师的吸引和排斥信号，实现针对性的概念抑制。
AI.result: 在保持良性生成能力的同时，有效实现目标概念的抑制。
AI.conclusion: GEM为Rectified Flow模型提供了一种简单高效的概念擦除框架，统一了轨迹级遗忘和教师引导擦除两种范式的优势。

title: Evaluating Interactive Reasoning in Large Language Models: A Hierarchical Benchmark with Executable Games
summary: We introduce a multi-turn interactive framework for reasoning evaluation that treats reasoning as active evidence acquisition and belief updating. Wherein, LLMs receive only the task rules, must issue targeted queries to a hidden environment, integrate partial observations over time, and decide when to submit a final answer. Beyond standard success rate and interaction efficiency, we evaluate contextual robustness under controlled contextual perturbations, and metacognitive adaptation through counterfactual revision and necessity judgment. We instantiate the framework as a benchmark of 474 executable games, each evaluated under five fixed configuration search spaces corresponding to five difficulty levels, and evaluate a broad set of frontier LLMs. Results show that the benchmark is highly discriminative, exposing large differences not only in success rate but also in interaction efficiency. Moreover, we empirically show that contextual perturbations cause moderate but consistent declines, whereas counterfactual revision and necessity judgment lead to much larger drops.

AI.tldr: 提出一个多轮交互推理框架，将推理视为主动证据获取和信念更新，并通过包含474个可执行游戏的基准测试，评估LLM在交互效率、上下文鲁棒性和元认知适应方面的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有推理评估多聚焦于单轮静态推理，忽视了真实场景中推理往往是多轮交互、主动获取信息的过程，缺乏对模型交互式推理能力、上下文鲁棒性和元认知适应能力的系统性评估。
AI.method: 构建多轮交互框架，LLM仅接收任务规则，需主动向隐藏环境发出查询、整合部分观测信息并决定何时提交答案；设计了5个难度级别、474个可执行游戏，并引入上下文扰动、反事实修正和必要性判断等评估维度。
AI.result: 基准测试具有高度区分性，揭示出前沿LLM在成功率和交互效率上的显著差异；上下文扰动导致中等但一致的性能下降，而反事实修正和必要性判断则导致更大的性能下降。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效评估了LLM的多轮交互推理能力，表明当前模型在元认知适应性方面存在明显短板，为未来推理评估提供了新的维度与方向。

title: Knowing When to Move: Evidence Accumulation Models of Human Behavior in Traffic
summary: Evidence accumulation models provide a formal framework for studying decision making as a dynamic process unfolding over time. While these models have been extensively developed and reviewed in laboratory paradigms, their structured application in complex, ecologically valid domains has received comparatively little attention. Road traffic is a particularly relevant context for studying sustained, embodied perception action behavior, where decisions unfold under time pressure and involve continuous control and ongoing perception-action coupling. Examining how EAMs have been applied in this domain may therefore offer insights beyond discrete laboratory tasks toward decision making in real-world behavior. This semi-systematic review synthesizes 28 studies (2014-2026) applying EAMs to traffic-related behavior. We organize the literature along two dimensions: 1) modelling level, distinguishing models at the level of discrete decision-making and models at the level of continuous action control, and 2) model architecture, distinguishing evidence accumulation as either a stand-alone decision model or an embedded component within broader perception-action or interaction frameworks. These distinctions are associated with systematic differences in model architecture, parameterization, data usage, and validation strategies, reflecting task specific demands. By providing a structured overview of these patterns, this review clarifies how EAMs are currently instantiated in traffic contexts and highlights methodological challenges and future directions both in traffic modelling and in modelling of decision-making more broadly. Promising directions include laboratory work on evidence accumulation in sustained and time-varying tasks, interactive multi-individual decision-making, and the use of neurophysiological measures to identify the perceptual evidence underlying complex perception-action behavior.

AI.tldr: 本文半系统性综述了2014-2026年间28项将证据累积模型(EAMs)应用于交通行为决策的研究，揭示了EAMs在生态效度高的持续性感知-行动任务中的应用现状、方法学挑战与未来方向。
AI.motivation: 实验室范式下的EAMs已得到充分发展，但在复杂、生态效度高的现实领域中的应用缺乏系统梳理。道路交通作为持续性感知-行动决策的典型场景，为理解真实世界中的决策动态过程提供了独特视角。
AI.method: 采用半系统性综述方法，对28项研究(2014-2026年)按两个维度进行组织：1)建模层次(离散决策层面vs.连续行动控制层面)；2)模型架构(独立决策模型vs.嵌入更广泛感知-行动或交互框架中的组件)。
AI.result: 不同分类维度对应着模型架构、参数化、数据使用和验证策略上的系统性差异，反映了任务特定需求。综述厘清了EAMs在交通情境中的具体实现模式。
AI.conclusion: 未来方向包括：持续性和时变任务中的证据累积研究、交互式多主体决策、以及利用神经生理测量来揭示复杂感知-行动行为背后的知觉证据过程。

title: Adaptive data selection improves wearable prediction under low baseline performance
summary: Adaptive sensing strategies that selectively sample data are increasingly used in wearable health systems to improve prediction performance under limited data budgets, yet their benefits across individuals remain poorly understood. Here, we evaluate adaptive selection of time windows for model training under fixed measurement budgets across multiple sensing modalities, including heart rate, activity, and ecological momentary assessment (EMA), in a longitudinal wearable dataset. We quantify performance gains relative to random sampling using both area under the receiver operating characteristic curve (AUROC) and F1 score. Adaptive strategies yield substantial improvements in AUROC for participants with low baseline performance (with gains up to 0.7), while offering limited or negative gains for participants with strong baselines. Across modalities, adaptive gain is strongly inversely correlated with baseline performance (Pearson r = -0.67; Spearman p = -0.62). At the participant level, most individuals benefit in AUROC (60-80% across modalities), although improvements in F1 are smaller and less consistent. These findings show that adaptive sensing is not uniformly beneficial, but instead provides the greatest value in underperforming settings. Our results support selective deployment strategies that tailor adaptive sensing based on baseline performance to improve efficiency in wearable health monitoring.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了可穿戴健康系统中自适应感知策略在不同个体间的效果差异，发现该策略对基线表现差的参与者提升显著（AUROC最高提升0.7），而对基线好的参与者收益有限或为负，表明自适应感知并非普遍有益，应基于基线表现选择性部署。
AI.motivation: 可穿戴健康系统中自适应感知策略虽然在有限数据预算下能提升预测性能，但其在不同个体间的收益差异尚不明确，现有研究缺乏对此的系统性评估。
AI.method: 在纵向可穿戴数据集中，针对心率、活动和生态瞬时评估（EMA）等多种感知模态，在固定测量预算下评估自适应选择训练时间窗的策略，并以随机采样为基线，使用AUROC和F1分数量化性能提升。
AI.result: 自适应策略对基线表现差的参与者AUROC提升显著（最高达0.7），对基线好的参与者收益有限或为负；增益与基线表现呈强负相关（Pearson r=-0.67; Spearman p=-0.62）；60-80%的参与者在AUROC上受益，但F1提升较小且不一致。
AI.conclusion: 自适应感知并非普遍有益，其在表现不佳的场景中价值最大；研究支持基于基线表现选择性部署自适应感知策略，以提高可穿戴健康监测的效率。

title: A Multi-AI-agent Framework Enabling End-to-end Finite Element Analysis for Solid Mechanics Problems
summary: Finite element analysis (FEA) is the most important numerical approach for solid mechanics. Challenges of FEA include a steep learning curve for entry-level users and potential false simulations due to incorrect definitions of key simulation components, such as boundary conditions, load cases, and solution variables. Years of engineering experience are usually necessary for real-world problem-solving. To address these issues, we present AbaqusAgent, a multi-agent framework grounded in large language models (LLMs) for solid mechanics analyses. AbaqusAgent is developed to facilitate analysis case generation and execution using Abaqus, one of the most widely used FEA packages, by turning users' natural-language instructions into executed FEA analyses and result visualization. AbaqusAgent is composed of six agents, including interpreter, architect, input writer, runner, reviewer, and visualizer agents, encompassing all the essential pre-processing and post-processing steps of standard FEA analyses. A wide variety of 50 solid mechanics problems have been successfully validated, achieving an overall success rate of 86%. Beyond improving the efficiency of FEA for solid mechanics problems and lowering the barrier to computational mechanics education, AbaqusAgent advances the human-simulation interaction paradigm and enables integration with AI-empowered optimization and material characterization workflows. The code is available at https://github.com/LIRAM-LIN/AbaqusAgent

AI.tldr: 本文提出了AbaqusAgent，一个基于大语言模型的多智能体框架，用于将自然语言指令自动转化为Abaqus有限元分析，在50个固体力学问题中取得了86%的成功率。
AI.motivation: 传统有限元分析存在学习曲线陡峭、关键参数（如边界条件、载荷等）易定义错误导致仿真失效的问题，且通常需要多年工程经验才能解决实际问题。
AI.method: 基于大语言模型构建了包含六个智能体（解释器、架构师、输入编写器、运行器、审查器、可视化器）的多智能体框架AbaqusAgent，覆盖前处理和后处理全流程。
AI.result: 在50个固体力学问题上成功验证，总体成功率达到86%。
AI.conclusion: AbaqusAgent不仅提高了FEA效率并降低了计算力学教育门槛，还推动了人机仿真交互范式的进步，并可与AI驱动的优化和材料表征工作流集成。

title: BudgetDraft: Acceptance-Aware Multi-View Training for Sparse-KV Speculative Decoding
summary: Speculative decoding speeds up autoregressive decoding by using a drafter to propose multiple tokens that a verifier validates in parallel. In resource-constrained deployments, the drafter uses a sparse KV cache to limit peak GPU memory and end-to-end latency under a fixed KV budget, while the verifier keeps a full KV cache. Mid-to-long context inference (4K--16K context length) is common in real applications. However, naive sparse/full speculative decoding suffers from the sparse/full mismatch as context length grows, causing the acceptance rate to drop quickly. We propose BudgetDraft, a multi-view sparse training method for sparse drafting in mid-to-long inference. The drafter is exposed to multiple sampled KV budgets during training and learns to align each sparse view with one shared full-cache teacher target. BudgetDraft combines an acceptance-aware loss on a full-cache branch with a multi-view loss on a sparse-cache branch, producing a single budget-robust drafter that recovers acceptance across sparsity levels without extra inference-time components. Experimental results on PG-19, LongBench, and LWM show that BudgetDraft achieves up to 6.55x, 4.46x, and 2.10x end-to-end speedup vs AR at 4K, 8K, and 16K context lengths, while keeping the inference pipeline memory-friendly.

AI.tldr: BudgetDraft提出了一种多视角稀疏训练方法，通过让草稿模型在训练时暴露于多种KV缓存预算下，学习对齐稀疏视图与全缓存教师目标，解决中长上下文推理中稀疏/全缓存不匹配导致的接受率下降问题，在4K-16K上下文长度下实现2.10x-6.55x端到端加速。
AI.motivation: 在资源受限的部署中，推测解码使用稀疏KV缓存的草稿模型来限制峰值GPU内存和延迟，但随上下文增长（4K-16K），稀疏与全缓存之间的不匹配导致接受率快速下降，亟需一种能应对这种不匹配的稀疏草稿训练方法。
AI.method: 提出BudgetDraft多视角稀疏训练方法：训练时让草稿模型暴露于多种采样的KV预算下，将每个稀疏视图与共享的全缓存教师目标对齐；结合全缓存分支上的接受感知损失和稀疏缓存分支上的多视角损失，训练出一个对多种稀疏水平都鲁棒的单一草稿模型，无需额外推理组件。
AI.result: 在PG-19、LongBench和LWM数据集上，BudgetDraft在4K、8K和16K上下文长度下分别实现高达6.55x、4.46x和2.10x的端到端加速（相较于自回归解码），同时保持推理管道的内存友好性。
AI.conclusion: BudgetDraft通过多视角训练有效解决了中长上下文推理中稀疏/全缓存不匹配问题，在保持内存效率的同时显著加速了推测解码，且无需引入额外推理时组件。

title: CAST: Non-Privileged Clipped Asymmetric Self-Teaching with Advantage Flipping for GRPO
summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR), especially Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), has been widely used to improve reasoning in large language models. However, outcome-level rewards provide only sparse supervision, and group-relative advantages vanish when all sampled trajectories for a prompt are either correct or incorrect. On-Policy Self-Distillation (OPSD) offers dense token-level guidance, but its token preferences are not necessarily aligned with trajectory correctness; empirical diagnostics show that OPSD signals behave differently on correct and incorrect rollouts, with teacher-positive and teacher-negative gap signals exhibiting different noise profiles. These diagnostics are conducted under an OPSD-style privileged teacher context for analysis only, whereas CAST training uses answer-free self-teacher scoring.Motivated by these observations, this work proposes CAST, an answer-free self-distillation method for GRPO-style RLVR. CAST keeps the verifier-grounded GRPO objective, but uses a stop-gradient self-teacher to shape token-level advantages according to trajectory correctness. Unlike prior self-distilled RLVR methods, CAST does not require reference-solution-conditioned teacher scoring, keeps the self-teacher log-probability gap active throughout training, and applies bidirectional local advantage sign reversal: teacher-negative tokens in correct trajectories can receive negative token-level advantages, while teacher-positive tokens in incorrect trajectories can receive bounded positive local advantages. For zero-variance all-correct and all-wrong groups, CAST assigns bounded sign-constrained base advantages, so these otherwise zero-gradient groups can contribute verifier-signed token feedback. Experiments on mathematical reasoning show that CAST improves RLVR training while retaining a lightweight, verifier-grounded trajectory-level objective.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CAST方法，一种无需参考答案的自蒸馏技术，用于改进GRPO风格的强化学习奖励验证，通过双向局部优势符号反转和零方差组基础优势分配，解决稀疏监督和零梯度问题。
AI.motivation: 现有RLVR方法存在两个问题：1）基于结果级别的奖励仅提供稀疏监督；2）当所有采样轨迹都正确或都错误时，组相对优势会消失（零梯度）。OPSD虽提供密集token级指导，但其偏好信号与轨迹正确性并不对齐。
AI.method: CAST方法：1）使用stop-gradient自教师模型根据轨迹正确性塑造token级优势；2）无需参考答案条件化教师评分；3）自教师log概率差距在整个训练中保持激活；4）双向局部优势符号反转：正确轨迹中的教师负token可获负优势，错误轨迹中的教师正token可获有界正局部优势；5）零方差全正确/全错误组分配有界符号约束基础优势。
AI.result: 在数学推理实验上，CAST改进了RLVR训练效果，同时保持了轻量级、验证器约束的轨迹级目标。
AI.conclusion: CAST通过自蒸馏方式有效解决了GRPO风格RLVR中的稀疏监督和零梯度问题，是一种实用且高效的改进方案。

title: MIA: A Visual Analytics System for Multimodal Spectral Imaging Data
summary: Hyperspectral bioimaging techniques such as infrared (IR) microscopy and laser ablation-inductively coupled plasma-mass spectrometry (LA-ICP-MS) produce high-dimensional, spatially resolved datasets that require sophisticated analysis to reveal chemically and anatomically meaningful structures. Existing software solutions are typically modality-specific and cover only parts of the analytical workflow, forcing researchers to transfer data across multiple tools and manually reconcile results. We present MIA (Multiscale Image Analysis), a modality-agnostic visual analysis environment that integrates the full exploratory workflow -- from spectral preprocessing and dimensionality reduction to interactive segmentation and spectral similarity analysis -- within a single, tightly coupled interface. MIA supports hierarchical and landmark-based embeddings to handle datasets of varying scale and complexity, interactive and automatic segmentation with a shared state across all linked views, and multimodal analysis of co-registered datasets from different instruments. We demonstrate the effectiveness of MIA through three use cases drawn from real analytical chemistry workflows: (1) the recovery of biologically meaningful tissue compartments through derivative preprocessing and hierarchical embedding, (2) pigment identification via spectral similarity search with spatial overview, and (3) multimodal tissue characterization combining molecular IR and elemental LA-ICP-MS data. Qualitative feedback from domain expert collaborators confirms that MIA reduces the need for tool-switching and supports analytical insights that are difficult to obtain with existing software.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MIA（多尺度图像分析）系统，一个模态无关的视觉分析环境，集成了高光谱生物成像数据从预处理到交互分割、光谱相似性分析及多模态分析的完整探索工作流，并通过三个实际用例验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有高光谱生物成像数据分析软件通常针对特定模态，且仅覆盖部分分析流程，迫使研究人员在多个工具间切换并手动整合结果，缺乏统一、高效的分析环境。
AI.method: MIA采用模态无关的视觉分析架构，集成光谱预处理、降维、层次化与地标式嵌入、交互式与自动分割（共享状态联动视图）、光谱相似性搜索及多模态数据协同分析等功能于单一界面。
AI.result: 通过三个真实用例（组织分区恢复、色素光谱识别、多模态组织表征）证明了MIA的有效性，专家反馈表明其减少了工具切换需求并支持了现有软件难以获得的分析洞察。
AI.conclusion: MIA作为一个统一的模态无关分析平台，能够显著提升高光谱生物成像数据分析的效率与深度，降低多工具切换带来的工作负担。

title: RAFT: Data Refinement and Adaptive Distillation for Domain Fine-Tuning with Alleviated Forgetting
summary: Domain-specific supervised fine-tuning (SFT) often improves in-domain performance at the cost of degrading a model's general capabilities. We view this degradation through two practical gaps in domain SFT: a supervision-compatibility gap, where domain targets differ in style and reasoning format from the original model's natural responses, and a trajectory-preservation gap, where teacher-forced SFT optimizes fixed target tokens without constraining the model's behavior on its own generated prefixes. This process fails to preserve the model's original behavior. We propose RAFT (Data Refinement and Adaptive Distillation for Domain Fine-Tuning with Alleviated Forgetting), a two-stage framework that addresses both factors. First, RAFT constructs model-compatible supervision through self-conditioned rewriting, semantic filtering, and answer fusion. Second, RAFT performs Answer-Conditioned On-Policy Distillation, where the original instruction-tuned model provides soft targets on student-generated trajectories while being conditioned on the fused answer as helpful context. We further introduce top-K temperature distillation and EMA-based adaptive loss balancing to stabilize the domain-general trade-off. Across three instruction-tuned backbones and five domains, RAFT improves average domain accuracy by 23.2% over standard SFT, while recovering part of the SFT-induced degradation on MS-Bench and IFEval, with relative improvements of 18.2% and 10.2%, respectively. These results show that coupling data refinement with trajectory-level preservation provides an effective recipe for domain fine-tuning with alleviated forgetting.

AI.tldr: 提出RAFT框架，通过数据精炼（自条件改写、语义过滤、答案融合）和答案条件在线蒸馏（Top-K温度蒸馏、EMA自适应损失平衡）两阶段方法，缓解领域SFT中模型通用能力退化问题，在5个领域平均提升23.2%领域准确率，并在通用基准上分别提升18.2%和10.2%。
AI.motivation: 领域SFT常导致模型通用能力退化，现有方法忽视了两个关键问题：监督兼容性缺口（领域目标与模型自然响应在风格和推理格式上不一致）和轨迹保持缺口（教师强制SFT优化固定目标token，未约束模型在自身生成前缀上的行为）。
AI.method: 两阶段框架RAFT：第一阶段通过自条件改写、语义过滤和答案融合构建模型兼容的监督数据；第二阶段执行答案条件在线蒸馏，利用原始指令微调模型在学生生成轨迹上提供软目标，并引入Top-K温度蒸馏和EMA自适应损失平衡以稳定领域-通用权衡。
AI.result: 在三个指令微调基座模型和五个领域上，RAFT相比标准SFT平均提升23.2%领域准确率；在MS-Bench和IFEval上分别相对提升18.2%和10.2%，有效恢复SFT导致的通用能力退化。
AI.conclusion: 将数据精炼与轨迹级保持相结合，为缓解领域微调中的遗忘问题提供了有效方案。

title: TIGER: Traceable Inference with Graph-Based Evidence Routing for Mitigating Hallucinations in Multimodal Generation
summary: We study fact-level repair for multimodal generation, where a fluent output may contain specific facts that are not supported by the input. Existing inference-time repair methods often generate feedback by jointly conditioning on the input and the current output. This design has two limitations: hallucinated claims in the output can bias the model's interpretation of the input, and free-form feedback cannot be ranked or scheduled at the fact level. We present TIGER, an inference-time framework that redesigns feedback for localized repair. TIGER independently extracts an observation graph from the input and a claim graph from the current output, then assigns each claim a graph-conditioned risk score based on support and conflict. The model repairs selected high-risk claims while keeping the backbone frozen. We provide a convergence analysis showing that the expected total risk decreases geometrically to an explicit asymptotic bound under mild assumptions. Experiments across four cross-modal paths, including image-to-text, image+text-to-text, audio-to-text, and video-to-text, show that TIGER reduces unsupported content while preserving task quality. The gains hold across multiple backbones, and a CrisisFACTS case study suggests that the same repair mechanism can improve grounding in multi-source settings.

AI.tldr: TIGER是一个推理时框架，通过独立提取输入观测图和输出声明图，基于图条件风险评分定位并修复多模态生成中的事实错误，在四种跨模态任务上有效减少不支撑内容。
AI.motivation: 现有推理时修复方法存在两个局限：输出中的幻觉性主张会偏置模型对输入的解释，且自由形式的反馈无法在事实层级进行排序和调度。
AI.method: TIGER独立提取输入的观测图和输出的声明图，为每个声明计算图条件风险分数（基于支撑与冲突），选取高风险声明进行修复，同时冻结主模型参数。
AI.result: 在图像到文本、图像+文本到文本、音频到文本、视频到文本四种跨模态路径上，TIGER有效减少不支撑内容且保持任务质量，在多个骨干模型上表现一致。
AI.conclusion: TIGER通过事实级局部修复机制，在理论上具有几何级收敛保证，并在多模态和多源场景（如CrisisFACTS案例）中展现出良好的可泛化性。

title: pcbGPT: Automatic PCB Schematic Synthesis from Natural Language Requirements
summary: Translating natural-language hardware requirements into correct printed circuit board (PCB) schematics remains difficult in embedded, IoT, and wearable development. Designers must choose compatible components, interpret datasheets, add support circuitry, and expose correct interfaces before layout and prototyping can begin, while many such circuits cannot be validated through straightforward simulation. We present pcbGPT, a grounded system for generating editable KiCad schematics from natural-language specifications. pcbGPT represents circuits in a Python DSL and combines tool-augmented synthesis with component-library search, datasheet-grounded design knowledge, execution-based checking, structural and semantic validation, and an interactive web workflow that supports iterative refinement and synchronization with KiCad projects. We evaluate the system on 20 embedded schematic-generation tasks with reference implementations, required components, and interface constraints that enable automatic comparison. The best model reaches overall pass@1 of 0.90 and pass@5 of 1.00; pass@1 is 1.00 on basic and easy tasks, 0.91 on medium tasks, and 0.72 on hard tasks. These results, together with failure analysis, show that pcbGPT can already generate useful, reviewable first-draft schematics for early prototyping, but is not yet reliable enough to replace expert review.

AI.tldr: 本文提出pcbGPT系统，能从自然语言硬件需求自动生成可编辑的KiCad PCB原理图，结合Python DSL、组件库搜索、数据手册知识、执行检查与验证，在20项任务上达到pass@1为0.90，pass@5为1.00，适合早期原型设计但尚不能替代专家复审。
AI.motivation: 将自然语言硬件需求转化为正确的PCB原理图仍然困难，设计者需选择兼容组件、解读数据手册、添加支持电路等，且许多电路无法通过简单仿真验证，亟需自动化辅助工具。
AI.method: pcbGPT采用Python DSL表示电路，结合工具增强合成、组件库搜索、基于数据手册的设计知识、执行检查、结构与语义验证，以及支持迭代精化并与KiCad项目同步的交互式Web工作流。
AI.result: 在20项嵌入式原理图生成任务上，最佳模型总体pass@1达0.90，pass@5达1.00；基础/简单任务pass@1为1.00，中等任务0.91，困难任务0.72。
AI.conclusion: pcbGPT能生成有用且可审阅的初版原理图用于早期原型设计，但可靠性尚不足以替代专家复审。

title: Emergence of Exploration in Policy Gradient Reinforcement Learning via Retrying
summary: In reinforcement learning (RL), agents benefit from exploration only because they repeatedly encounter similar states: trying different actions can improve performance or reduce uncertainty; without such retries, a greedy policy is optimal. We formalize this intuition with ReMax, an objective that evaluates a policy by the expected maximum return over $M$ samples, where $M$ is a positive integer, while accounting for return uncertainty. Optimizing this objective induces stochastic exploration as an emergent property, without explicit bonus terms. For efficient policy optimization, we derive a new policy-gradient formulation for ReMax and introduce ReMax PPO (RePPO), a PPO variant that optimizes ReMax while generalizing the discrete retry count $M$ to a continuous parameter $m > 0$, enabling fine-grained control of exploration. Empirically, RePPO promotes exploration, without any explicit exploration bonuses, on the MinAtar and Craftax benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ReMax目标，通过最大化M次采样中的期望最优回报来激励RL中的随机探索，并推出RePPO算法，无需显式探索奖励即可在MinAtar和Craftax基准上促进探索。
AI.motivation: RL中智能体从探索中获益的前提是能反复遇到相似状态；若没有重试，贪心策略即为最优。作者旨在形式化这一直觉，设计一种能自然诱导随机探索、无需显式探索奖励项的目标函数。
AI.method: 提出ReMax目标，即评估策略在M次采样中的期望最大回报；导出其策略梯度形式；将离散重试次数M推广为连续参数m>0，提出RePPO（ReMax PPO变体）。
AI.result: 在MinAtar和Craftax基准测试上，RePPO无需任何显式探索奖励即可有效促进探索行为。
AI.conclusion: ReMax目标能自然诱导随机探索，RePPO作为其高效优化算法，在多个基准上验证了有效性，为无需人工设计探索奖励的RL探索提供新思路。

title: MindZero: Learning Online Mental Reasoning With Zero Annotations
summary: Effective real-world assistance requires AI agents with robust Theory of Mind (ToM): inferring human mental states from their behavior. Despite recent advances, several key challenges remain, including (1) online inference with robust uncertainty updates over multiple hypotheses; (2) efficient reasoning suitable for real-time assistance; and (3) the lack of ground-truth mental state annotations in real-world domains. We address these challenges by introducing MindZero, a self-supervised reinforcement learning framework that trains multimodal large language models (MLLMs) for efficient and robust online mental reasoning. During training, the model is rewarded for generating mental state hypotheses that maximize the likelihood of observed actions estimated by a planner, similar to model-based ToM reasoning. This method thus eliminates the need for explicit mental state annotations. After training, MindZero internalizes model-based reasoning into fast single-pass inference. We evaluate MindZero against baselines across challenging mental reasoning and AI assistance tasks in gridworld and household domains. We found that LLMs alone are insufficient; model-based methods improve accuracy but are slow, costly, and limited by backbone MLLM capacity. In contrast, MindZero enhances MLLMs' intrinsic ToM ability and significantly outperforms model-based methods in both accuracy and efficiency, showing that mental reasoning can be effectively learned as a self-supervised skill.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MindZero框架，通过自监督强化学习训练多模态大语言模型，使其能够在无需人工标注的情况下进行高效的在线心智推理，显著提升了准确性和效率。
AI.motivation: 现有AI代理在心智理论推理中面临三大挑战：在线推理时对多个假设的不确定性更新不足、实时辅助所需的推理效率低下、以及现实世界中缺乏真实心智状态标注。作者旨在解决这些问题，开发无需显式标注即可进行高效心智推理的AI系统。
AI.method: 提出MindZero框架，采用自监督强化学习方法。训练时，模型通过生成心智状态假设来最大化规划器估计的观察行为似然性，从而获得奖励，类似于基于模型的心智推理。该方法无需显式心智状态标注。训练后，MindZero将基于模型的推理内化为快速的单次推理。
AI.result: 在网格世界和家庭领域的挑战性心智推理与AI辅助任务中，MindZero在准确性和效率上均显著优于基于模型的方法。LLM单独使用不足，基于模型的方法虽准确但速度慢、成本高且受限于骨干MLLM能力。
AI.conclusion: 心智推理可以作为一种自监督技能被有效学习，MindZero增强了MLLM的内在心智推理能力，展示了自监督学习在提升AI代理心智理论能力方面的巨大潜力。

title: From Craft Practice to Aesthetic Cognition Transmission: Workflow Cognition Translation for AI-native Intangible Cultural Heritage Education
summary: Intangible Cultural Heritage (ICH) education has traditionally relied on apprenticeship, embodied participation, and long-term engagement with masters, materials, and cultural environments. While these modes of transmission remain essential, they are difficult to scale. Existing digital heritage initiatives have expanded documentation and access, but often preserve artefacts, procedures, and representations of practice rather than the aesthetic and cognitive structures through which expertise operates. This paper argues that the future challenge of ICH education is not only the transmission of craft techniques, but the scalable transmission of aesthetic cognition: the perception, judgement, interpretation, and culturally situated meaning-making through which aesthetic expertise develops. Drawing on aesthetic education, tacit knowledge, cognitive apprenticeship, and expert cognition, we propose a shift from craft transmission to Aesthetic Cognition Transmission. To support this shift, we introduce Workflow Cognition as a model of how experts coordinate perception, judgement, decision-making, and action within evolving workflows. We then propose Workflow Cognition Translation as a methodological framework for transforming expert workflow cognition into computable educational representations for AI-native learning systems. The paper makes three contributions: it reframes ICH education around aesthetic cognition transmission; introduces Workflow Cognition Translation as a method for representing expert aesthetic cognition; and outlines an AI-native cognitive apprenticeship infrastructure involving AI Expert Twins, workflow-based tutoring, and progressive learner participation. Rather than replacing masters, workshops, or embodied practice, the framework positions AI as a cognition mediation infrastructure for expanding access to heritage expertise.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将非物质文化遗产教育从技艺传承转向审美认知传承，通过工作流认知翻译方法，将专家认知转化为可计算的教育表征，构建AI原生的认知学徒基础设施，以规模化传播文化遗产专业知识。
AI.motivation: 传统非遗教育依赖师徒制、具身参与和长期实践，难以规模化；现有数字化项目主要保存器物和流程，而非专家运作的审美认知结构。因此需要解决审美认知的可规模化传承问题。
AI.method: 提出工作流认知（Workflow Cognition）模型描述专家如何协调感知、判断、决策与行动；进而提出工作流认知翻译（Workflow Cognition Translation）方法论，将专家工作流认知转化为可计算的、AI原生学习系统可使用的教育表征。
AI.result: 三个贡献：1）将非遗教育重新框架为审美认知传承；2）提出工作流认知翻译作为表征专家审美认知的方法；3）勾勒AI原生认知学徒基础设施，包括AI专家孪生、基于工作流的辅导和渐进式学习者参与。
AI.conclusion: 该框架并非取代大师、工坊或具身实践，而是将AI定位为认知中介基础设施，用于扩大文化遗产专业知识的获取范围。

title: ChurnNet: A Optimized Modern AI for Churn Prediction
summary: Increased competition and the growing similarity of products and services offered by retailers have lowered the barriers for customers to switch to competitors. Accurate churn prediction can be a valuable tool for driving effective personalized marketing campaigns and helping to reduce customer attrition.
