MLP-based architectures learn channel-dependent filters that are largely shared across nodes, while hop-attention-based architectures learn node-dependent mixtures that are largely shared across channels. This reveals a missing regime in standard PPGNN designs: joint node- and channel-adaptive filtering under the pre-propagation computational contract. We propose FilterMoE, a mixture-of-experts PPGNN in which a small bank of learnable Chebyshev filter experts is routed jointly over nodes and channels by a 3D gating tensor. Across eleven homophilic and heterophilic benchmarks, FilterMoE outperforms strong PPGNN baselines on nine datasets and ranks first on all three large-scale benchmarks, improving the average test score by 1.53 points. These results establish joint node-channel filter routing as a robust alternative to dataset-specific hop-aggregator selection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FilterMoE，一种混合专家预传播图神经网络，通过3D门控张量在节点和通道维度上联合路由可学习的Chebyshev滤波器专家，解决了现有PPGNN在滤波器系数共享策略上的缺失问题，在11个基准测试中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有PPGNN中，复杂跳聚合器并不总能优于简单MLP聚合器，这一现象令人困惑。作者从图滤波器角度重新审视，发现现有设计在滤波器系数共享策略上存在缺失区域：缺乏联合节点自适应和通道自适应的滤波机制。
AI.method: 提出FilterMoE架构，采用混合专家机制，包含一小批可学习的Chebyshev滤波器专家，通过3D门控张量同时在节点和通道维度上进行路由选择，在预传播计算约束下实现联合节点-通道自适应滤波。
AI.result: 在11个同质性和异质性基准测试中，FilterMoE在9个数据集上优于强PPGNN基线，在所有3个大规模基准测试中排名第一，平均测试分数提升1.53个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 联合节点-通道滤波器路由可作为数据集特定跳聚合器选择的鲁棒替代方案，为PPGNN设计提供了新的有效范式。

title: Quantifying the Energy Floor: Direct Measurement and Replay Buffer Bias in SAC-Based HVAC Control on sbsim
comment: 5 pages, 3 figures, 2 tables. Presented at AI-DEEDS 2026 Workshop, ACM Sustainability Week, Banff, Canada (non-archival)
summary: We quantify the energy floor -- the minimum achievable cost given action space constraints -- for Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) HVAC control on the sbsim calibrated building simulator. Through minimum-action experiments, we directly measure this floor at USD 35.51/day, dominated by continuous electrical loads (USD 35.44, 99.8%) with negligible gas consumption. The standard SAC baseline, initialized with schedule-policy replay buffer transitions, converges to USD 37.18/day, 4.7% above the floor. We identify buffer initialization as the dominant source of sub-optimality in this scenario: training from an empty buffer reduces cost to USD 35.57/day, eliminating 96% of the gap. Expanding the supply water temperature range by 10 K yields negligible additional savings (USD 0.03/day), and further expansion triggers physical constraint violations. We additionally uncover a discount factor coupling (gamma_eff = 0.891) shrinking the effective planning horizon from 8.3 h to 46 min -- a benchmark-wide issue warranting audit. Systematic ablation across planning horizon, reward weights, and observation enrichment confirms all pre-filled-buffer configurations cluster within 0.7% (USD 37.18--USD 37.42), demonstrating that equipment minimum power -- not algorithmic design -- imposes the binding constraint.

AI.tldr: 本文量化了SAC算法在建筑暖通空调控制中的能量下限（35.51美元/天），发现标准SAC基线（37.18美元/天）高于下限4.7%，而主要次优性源于缓冲区初始化（空缓冲区可消除96%的差距），并揭示了折扣因子耦合、规划视域缩减等关键问题，最终证明设备最小功率而非算法设计是主要约束。
AI.motivation: 量化SAC算法在建筑暖通空调控制中的能量下限，识别性能次优性的根本来源，并评估不同设计选择对能耗的影响。
AI.method: 通过在sbsim校准建筑模拟器上进行最小动作实验直接测量能量下限，对比标准SAC基线（使用调度策略回放缓冲区初始化），并进行缓冲区初始化、供水温度范围扩展、折扣因子分析及系统消融实验。
AI.result: 能量下限为35.51美元/天（电力占99.8%）；标准SAC基线为37.18美元/天，高出4.7%；空缓冲区初始化可降至35.57美元/天，消除96%差距；扩展供水温度范围仅节省0.03美元/天；发现折扣因子耦合导致有效规划视域从8.3小时缩至46分钟。
AI.conclusion: SAC在暖通空调控制中的主要性能瓶颈是缓冲区初始化策略，而非算法设计本身；设备最小功率是成本的主要约束；同时需警惕折扣因子耦合导致的规划视域缩减问题。

title: DOT-MoE: Differentiable Optimal Transport for MoEfication
summary: The scaling of Large Language Models (LLMs) has driven significant performance gains but created substantial challenges in inference efficiency. While Mixture of Experts (MoEs) architectures address this by decoupling model size from inference cost, training MoEs from scratch is often unstable and compute intensive. Conversion of pre-trained dense models into sparse MoEs has emerged as an alternative solution; however, existing methods typically rely on heuristic neuron clustering or random splitting to partition the Feed-Forward Network (FFN) into experts. In this work, we propose DOT-MoE, a novel framework that formulates the decomposition of dense layers as a Differentiable Optimal Transport (DOT) problem. Instead of static heuristics, we model neuron assignment as a balanced transport problem, utilizing differentiable Sinkhorn-Knopp iterations to enforce strict expert capacity constraints. Furthermore, we utilize Straight-Through Estimators (STE) to jointly learn the discrete neuron-to-expert assignment and the token-to-expert routing policy end-to-end. Extensive experiments across multiple architectures and benchmarks demonstrate that DOT-MoE significantly outperforms structured pruning, heuristic clustering, and random-split baselines, retaining 90% of the original dense model's performance while reducing active parameters by 50%.

AI.tldr: 提出DOT-MoE框架，通过可微最优传输将密集模型转换为稀疏MoE，在减少50%活跃参数的同时保留90%原始性能。
AI.motivation: 现有从密集模型转换为稀疏MoE的方法依赖启发式神经元聚类或随机分割，缺乏端到端可学习的分配策略，转换效率和效果有限。
AI.method: 将密集层分解建模为可微最优传输问题，利用可微Sinkhorn-Knopp迭代实现神经元的均衡分配，并结合直通估计器联合学习神经元到专家的离散分配与令牌到专家的路由策略。
AI.result: 在多种架构和基准上，DOT-MoE显著优于结构化剪枝、启发式聚类和随机分割基线，在减少50%活跃参数的情况下保留原始密集模型90%的性能。
AI.conclusion: 可微最优传输为密集模型到稀疏MoE的转换提供了一种端到端可学习的高效方案，平衡了模型压缩与性能保留。

title: ATLAS: Agentic Test-time Learning-to-Allocate Scaling
summary: Test-time scaling has become a major way to improve large language model reasoning, but its orchestration has remained designer-engineered: a fixed sample budget, a fixed refinement loop, a fixed scoring rule, or a fixed search policy decides how compute is spent, leaving the model in charge of solving but not of orchestration. We introduce ATLAS, an agentic test-time scaling framework in which an LLM orchestrator owns the control loop end-to-end. Through a single action, explore, which dispatches a fresh independent solver on the original problem, the orchestrator decides whether to gather more evidence, when to stop, and how to synthesize the final answer; the action space is extensible, with each explore call optionally specifying solver, reasoning effort, or prompting strategy. We evaluate ATLAS on four benchmarks covering scientific question answering, code generation, and multimodal reasoning under a Claude Sonnet 4.6 backbone, where it reaches 56.00% on HLE-Verified, 82.29% on LiveCodeBench, 85.75% on GPQA-Diamond, and 23.71% on BabyVision while using far fewer API calls than fixed-workflow baselines. A multi-model extension, ATLAS-MM, that exposes solver choice as an additional action dimension further improves HLE-Verified to 60.00% and LiveCodeBench to 85.63%, with consistent gains on GPQA-Diamond and BabyVision. Ablations replacing the orchestrator's direct synthesis with a separate integrator degrade or fail to improve accuracy on three of four benchmarks, consistent with the role of stateful evidence management in producing the gains.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ATLAS框架，让LLM作为编排器自主控制测试时计算的分配（探索、停止、合成），在四个基准上超越固定工作流基线，且使用更少的API调用。
AI.motivation: 现有测试时扩展方法（固定采样预算、固定精炼循环等）由人工设计编排策略，模型只负责推理而不负责计算资源的调度决策，缺乏自主性和灵活性。
AI.method: 提出ATLAS框架，核心是一个LLM编排器，通过"explore"动作派遣独立的求解器处理原始问题，编排器自主决定何时收集更多证据、何时停止以及如何综合最终答案。动作空间可扩展，每个explore可指定求解器、推理努力或提示策略。还提出多模型扩展ATLAS-MM，将求解器选择作为额外动作维度。
AI.result: 在Claude Sonnet 4.6骨干下，HLE-Verified达56.00%，LiveCodeBench达82.29%，GPQA-Diamond达85.75%，BabyVision达23.71%，API调用远少于固定工作流基线。ATLAS-MM进一步将HLE-Verified提升至60.00%，LiveCodeBench提升至85.63%。
AI.conclusion: 让LLM自主编排测试时计算资源分配是有效的，且状态化的证据管理对性能提升至关重要；消融实验表明用独立集成器替代编排器的直接合成会降低性能。

title: RDA: Reward Design Agent for Reinforcement Learning
summary: Reinforcement learning has enabled the acquisition of impressive robotic skills, but typically requires hand-crafted reward functions that are slow to design and difficult to align with human intentions. Recent work, such as Eureka, automates reward design by using an LLM to iteratively generate and refine reward code from task descriptions. However, they rely on coarse feedback signals such as success rate, which provide little semantic insight into the learned behavior. As a result, their trained policies achieve the final goal but are frequently poorly aligned with task instructions. We introduce the Reward Design Agent (RDA), a VLM-based agentic framework that injects semantic understanding into reward design. RDA decomposes tasks, visually evaluates trajectories, summarizes failure modes, and iteratively revises reward code to better align with task instructions. Across 12 tabletop manipulation tasks from ManiSkill and 4 whole-body manipulation tasks from HumanoidBench, RDA produces policies substantially more instruction-aligned than those of other baselines, while achieving comparable task success rates. Videos and the generated reward code are available on https://nitinkamra1992.github.io/reward-design-agent.

AI.tldr: 本文提出奖励设计智能体(RDA)，利用视觉语言模型(VLM)为机器人任务设计奖励函数，相比现有方法(如Eureka)能生成更符合任务指令的策略。
AI.motivation: 现有的LLM驱动的奖励设计方法(如Eureka)仅依赖成功率等粗粒度反馈信号，缺乏对学习行为的语义理解，导致训练出的策略虽能达成最终目标，但与任务指令的匹配度较差。
AI.method: RDA是一个基于VLM的智能体框架，通过分解任务、视觉评估轨迹、总结失败模式、迭代修正奖励代码四个步骤，将语义理解注入奖励设计过程。
AI.result: 在ManiSkill的12个桌面操作任务和HumanoidBench的4个全身操作任务上，RDA生成的策略在指令对齐程度上显著优于其他基线方法，同时任务成功率相当。
AI.conclusion: 基于VLM的奖励设计智能体能有效提升策略与任务指令的对齐度，为自动化奖励设计提供了更有语义理解能力的新范式。

title: CANARY: Zero-Label Detection of Fine-Tuning Contamination in Language Models
summary: Adversaries can implant latent harmful behavior by poisoning as few as 1% of fine-tuning examples. The contamination is invisible to every output-level defense: harmful behavior lies dormant in the model's hidden-state geometry and does not appear in generated text until contamination exceeds 7.5%. We introduce CANARY (Contamination Auditor via Neural Activation Representation Yield), a zero-label checkpoint auditor that detects this hidden shift directly from two forward passes over an unlabeled prompt set. CANARY projects the hidden-state difference through a Sparse Autoencoder, filtering style noise to isolate meaningful semantic drift. It achieves AUROC = 1.000 at 1% contamination (95% CI = [0.997, 1.000]; Cohen's d = 3.28) across four model architectures and two training paradigms, 7.5x below where any output-level method fires, with zero false positives on benign fine-tuning and full robustness to style-matching and gradient-noise adaptive attacks. The same SAE feature basis drives a complete governance pipeline: SAE-filtered amplification surfaces latent harm at a 5x higher rate than standard generation; score-ranked prompts yield 4.2x red-teaming lift; and suppressing a handful of contamination-specific features at inference time reduces harm from 70% to 10% with no perplexity penalty. CANARY is the first zero-label framework to detect, verify, prioritize, and remediate supply-chain contamination from hidden states alone.

AI.tldr: 提出CANARY框架，通过稀疏自编码器分析隐藏状态差异，能在仅有1%的投毒数据下完美检测（AUROC=1.000），远优于输出级方法，并支持检测、验证、优先排序和修复的完整治理流程。
AI.motivation: adversaries可以通过微调注入潜伏有害行为，而现有输出级防御完全无效，需要在有害行为显现前检测隐藏污染。
AI.method: 利用稀疏自编码器（SAE）对模型隐藏状态差进行投影，过滤风格噪声以隔离语义漂移；仅需两个前向传播和无标签提示集即可实现零标注检测。
AI.result: 在四种模型架构和两种训练范式下，1%污染时AUROC=1.000（95% CI=[0.997,1.000], Cohen's d=3.28），比输出级方法提前7.5倍触发，零误报；SAE放大使潜伏危害显现率提高5倍；基于分数的提示选择带来4.2倍红队测试提升；抑制特定特征可将危害从70%降至10%而不影响困惑度。
AI.conclusion: CANARY是首个仅依赖隐藏状态实现供应链污染检测、验证、优先级排序和修复的零标注框架。

title: Two-Fidelity Best-Action Identification for Stochastic Minimax Tree
summary: We study fixed-confidence best-action identification (BAI) in stochastic minimax trees. This problem is increasingly relevant in modern AI planning, where deep minimax search and Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) with language model long rollouts face a fundamental tradeoff: heuristic evaluations are cheap but biased, while accurate rollouts are reliable but prohibitively expensive. We propose 2FFS, a two-fidelity tree-search algorithm that brings multi-fidelity flat bandit ideas into trees. The algorithm combines minimax-style fast expansion with MCTS-style stochastic sampling, adaptively deciding when to exploit cheap biased evaluations and when to invoke expensive accurate evaluations for local certification. We prove fixed-confidence correctness, establish finite stopping for exact identification, and give a polynomial-depth cost upper bound for general-depth trees. Across numerical stochastic-tree experiments, 2FFS uses substantially fewer samples and computational operations comparing to existing BAI-MCTS baseline.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种双保真度树搜索算法2FFS，用于随机minimax树中的最优动作识别，在保证固定置信度正确性的同时，显著降低了样本和计算开销。
AI.motivation: 现代AI规划中，深度minimax搜索和MCTS面临启发式评估（便宜但有偏）与准确 rollout（可靠但昂贵）之间的权衡，亟需一种能自适应决策使用低成本评估或高成本精确评估的算法。
AI.method: 提出2FFS算法，将多保真度赌博机思想引入树搜索，结合minimax风格的快速扩展与MCTS风格的随机采样，自适应地在便宜有偏评估和昂贵准确评估之间切换，并进行局部认证。
AI.result: 证明了固定置信度下的正确性、精确识别的有限终止性，给出了一般深度树的多项式深度代价上界；数值实验表明2FFS比现有BAI-MCTS基线显著减少样本和计算操作。
AI.conclusion: 2FFS有效地解决了树搜索中高效性与准确性之间的权衡问题，为现代AI规划中结合大语言模型长rollout等场景提供了实用的解决方案。

title: Decentralized Instruction Tuning: Conflict-Aware Splitting and Weight Merging
comment: 32 pages, 5 figures. Accepted for publication at ICML 2026
summary: Instruction tuning aligns large language models, including multimodal ones, with diverse user intents, but scaling to heterogeneous mixtures is hindered by gradient interference and bandwidth-heavy synchronization. We ask whether these two bottlenecks can be addressed jointly by training parts of the mixture independently and reconciling them once in parameter space. We develop a local quadratic theory inside a shared flat basin that yields three results: weight merging produces a curvature-weighted variance reduction; PCA-aligned conflict splitting maximizes this gain along high-curvature directions; and merging additionally acts as spectral filtering with implicit norm regularization. These results directly motivate MERIT, a decentralized merge-ready instruction-tuning pipeline that estimates dataset-level gradient conflicts, partitions the mixture along the top PCA conflict axes, fine-tunes each partition independently with no inter-partition communication, and merges once via token-weighted averaging. On Qwen2.5-VL-3B with 136 Vision-FLAN tasks, MERIT improves the 8-benchmark average from 54.3 (joint training) to 57.0. The same recipe scales to a 7B model on a 1.6M-example, 176-source mixture -- matching or exceeding centralized joint training with minimal cost overhead -- and transfers to text-only FLAN. Our code is available at https://github.com/naver-ai/merit.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MERIT方法，通过独立训练各子任务数据并在参数空间进行合并，解决了多模态指令微调中梯度干扰和带宽同步两大瓶颈。在Qwen2.5-VL-3B的136个Vision-FLAN任务上，MERIT将8个基准平均分从54.3提升至57.0，并成功扩展到7B模型和1.6M样本的混合数据集。
AI.motivation: 多模态大模型的指令微调面临两大瓶颈：梯度干扰（不同任务间相互冲突）和带宽密集型同步（全量数据联合训练通信开销大）。作者希望探索能否通过独立训练子集后合并参数空间的方式，同时解决这两个问题。
AI.method: 1）提出局部二次理论，证明在共享平坦盆地内权重合并可产生曲率加权方差缩减；2）PCA对齐的冲突分裂沿高曲率方向最大化增益；3）合并具有频谱滤波和隐式范数正则化效果。基于这些理论提出MERIT：估计数据集级梯度冲突，沿PCA冲突轴划分数据，各分区独立微调无通信，最后通过token加权平均合并参数。
AI.result: 在Qwen2.5-VL-3B的136个Vision-FLAN任务上，MERIT将8基准平均分从54.3（联合训练）提升至57.0。该方案可扩展到7B模型和1.6M样本/176源的混合数据，以极低成本匹配或超越集中式联合训练，并迁移至纯文本FLAN任务。
AI.conclusion: MERIT验证了通过独立训练+参数合并可以同时解决梯度干扰和通信瓶颈两大问题，为大规模多模态指令微调提供了一种高效、去中心化的新范式。

title: Fair Finetuning Mitigates Distribution Inference Attacks
summary: Machine learning models trained on sensitive data can inadvertently leak population-level information about their training distributions -- a threat known as distribution inference attack (DIA). An adversary with black-box access can infer sensitive demographic properties, such as subgroup proportions, without observing any training data directly. While defenses such as differential privacy and property unlearning have been proposed, the link between fairness constraints and distributional leakage remains unexplored. We propose Fair Fine-tuning (FFt): a trained model is fine-tuned on samples from the complementary distribution under an Equalized Odds (EO) constraint. We provide a complete theoretical characterization, proving the tight bound $\text{Adv}(\mathcal{A},M_f) \le Δ_{\text{EO}} \cdot W$, where $W$ quantifies how distinguishable the two training distributions are by their sensitive-attribute composition. We also establish a necessary condition for FFt to reduce adversarial advantage and prove tightness of the bound. We evaluate across six datasets spanning tabular (ACS Income, COMPAS, German Credit), image (UTKFaces), and NLP (Bias in Bios) modalities. Rehearsal-based FFt consistently reduces the adversarial accuracy gap below the detection threshold $τ!=!0.1$ across all settings; on ACS Income, the gap falls from $\sim!15%$ to under $4%$. Our work provides the first formal bound connecting a model's measured EO disparity directly to its adversarial advantage in the DIA game, opening a new avenue for unified fairness-and-privacy defenses.

AI.tldr: 本文提出公平微调（FFt）方法，通过在互补分布上使用等几率约束进行微调，在理论上证明了模型公平性（EO差异）与分布推理攻击（DIA）对抗优势之间的紧界，实验表明该方法能有效降低隐私泄露风险。
AI.motivation: 先前研究关注差分隐私和属性遗忘等防御手段，但公平性约束与分布泄露之间的关联尚未被探索。本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 提出Fair Fine-tuning (FFt)方法：在互补分布上对训练好的模型使用等几率（Equalized Odds, EO）约束进行微调。理论推导出紧界 Adv ≤ Δ_EO · W，并证明FFt降低对抗优势的必要条件。
AI.result: 在6个数据集（ACS Income、COMPAS、German Credit、UTKFaces、Bias in Bios）上，基于回放的FFt一致将对抗准确率差距降至检测阈值0.1以下；ACS Income上差距从约15%降至4%以下。
AI.conclusion: 首次建立了模型EO差异与DIA对抗优势之间的形式化紧界，为统一的公平性与隐私防御开辟了新方向。

title: A Note on Stability for Orthogonalized Matrix Momentum with Client Sampling
summary: We study finite-sample generalization for a client-sampled distributed optimization scheme with matrix-valued parameters and orthogonalized momentum updates. The central quantity is the gap between the population and empirical objectives at the returned model when only a subset of clients participates in each round. Under independent heterogeneous client data, unequal local sample counts, and fixed aggregation weights, we derive a finite-round upper-tail guarantee from a coupled-neighbor stability recursion and a weighted concentration step. The bound keeps the client-selection counts through the amplification factor \(Y_i(\mathcal C)\); in the uniform full-participation full-batch regime, it yields \(\widetilde{\mathcal O}(n^{-1}+n^{-1/2})\) scaling whenever the horizon-dependent amplification terms are controlled. The matrix-orthogonalization rule is required to be Lipschitz along paired trajectories, a condition satisfied by regularized polar-type maps and normalized finite-step Newton--Schulz orthogonalizers. For the unregularized matrix sign, the same argument requires coupled spectral separation, whereas Gaussian smoothing gives a finite-round smoothed variant. A one-dimensional counterexample shows why a gap, smoothing, or regularity condition is necessary.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了客户端采样分布式优化方案的有限样本泛化界，针对矩阵值参数和正交化动量更新，推导出有限轮次的上尾保证，并分析了不同正交化方法的适用条件。
AI.motivation: 现有分布式优化研究多关注标量或向量参数，对矩阵值参数的泛化分析不足；同时客户端采样引入的随机性对泛化误差的影响缺乏有限样本保证。
AI.method: 采用耦合邻居稳定性递归和加权浓度步骤，推导有限轮次上尾保证；分析矩阵正交化规则的Lipschitz条件，研究规则化极映射、有限步Newton-Schulz正交化器及未规则化矩阵符号的适用性。
AI.result: 在均匀全参与全批处理机制下，当放大项受控时，泛化界达到\(\widetilde{\mathcal O}(n^{-1}+n^{-1/2})\)；发现未规则化矩阵符号需耦合谱分离条件，而高斯平滑可提供有限轮次平滑变体。
AI.conclusion: 分布式矩阵优化中，正交化规则的Lipschitz平滑性或谱分离条件是保证有限样本泛化界的必要条件，一维反例证实了该条件不可或缺。

title: Post-Deterministic Distributed Systems: A New Foundation for Trustworthy Autonomous Infrastructure
summary: For decades, distributed systems have typically assumed that correct participants execute protocol-specified behavior with stable, externally defined, and deterministic semantics. Classical theory has extensively parameterized network timing, communication topologies, and failure domains, but this participant model has remained comparatively fixed. The integration of autonomous reasoning engines, stochastic model-driven agents, and policy-driven actors into cloud control planes, incident response systems, and financial infrastructure challenges the universality of this assumption. These agents often produce divergent reasoning paths, distinct operational traces, and heterogeneous internal representations while achieving semantically equivalent and correct outcomes. In this paper, we introduce Post-Deterministic Distributed Systems (PDDS) as a research and engineering model for coordinating heterogeneous environments where deterministic code, stochastic models, and autonomous agents coexist. We show that classical distributed computing models form a zero-ambiguity special case of this participant-general model. We do not argue that deterministic systems disappear; rather, deterministic execution can no longer serve as the universal participant assumption for autonomous infrastructure. Finally, we outline five architectural pillars of post-deterministic infrastructure: Protocol-Driven Development, Verifiable Agentic Infrastructure, Autonomous State Control Planes, Semantic Quorum Assurance, and Epistemic State Replication. Epistemic State Replication extends persistence and consistency models from data visibility to knowledge visibility, enabling agentic memory, Verifiable Semantic Rollback, and coherence across reasoning participants. We also define a taxonomy of failure classes that arise in this setting.

AI.tldr: 本文提出后确定性分布式系统（PDDS）模型，挑战传统分布式系统假设——所有参与者必须执行确定性行为。在引入自主推理引擎、随机模型驱动智能体等异构参与者后，确定性执行不再普适，需建立新的协调框架，并提出了五大架构支柱与新的失败分类体系。
AI.motivation: 传统分布式系统假设参与者行为是确定性的，但现代云控制平面、事件响应系统与金融基础设施中引入了自主推理引擎、随机模型驱动智能体和策略驱动参与者，它们会产生不同推理路径和内部表示，打破了这一假设。现有理论缺乏处理这种异构参与者模型的框架。
AI.method: 提出Post-Deterministic Distributed Systems (PDDS)模型，将经典分布式计算模型作为零歧义特例纳入；定义五大架构支柱：协议驱动开发、可验证智能体基础设施、自主状态控制平面、语义仲裁保证和认知状态复制；建立新的失败类型分类体系。
AI.result: 古典分布式计算模型是PDDS的零歧义特例；确定性执行不再能作为自主基础设施的通用参与者假设；提出了认知状态复制，将一致性模型从数据可见性扩展到知识可见性，支持智能体记忆、可验证语义回滚和推理参与者间的协调性。
AI.conclusion: 确定性系统不会消失，但确定性执行不能再作为自主基础设施的通用参与者假设。PDDS为协调包含确定性代码、随机模型和自主智能体的异构环境提供了研究与工程框架。

title: Shortcut to Nowhere: Demystifying Deep Spurious Regression
summary: Real-world regression often exhibits shortcuts: attributes that are spuriously correlated with continuous targets in training, yet unreliable under deployment shifts; regressing targets using such shortcuts may fail catastrophically at test time. Existing studies on spurious correlations focus primarily on classification, where labels are categorical and groups are naturally defined. However, many real-world tasks require continuous prediction, where hard label boundaries or discrete group-label pairs do not exist. We define Deep Spurious Regression (DSR) as learning from regression data with attribute-label confounding, addressing continuous spurious correlations, and generalizing to all attribute-label combinations at test time. Motivated by the intrinsic difference between classification and regression shortcuts, we propose to exploit the similarity among spurious attributes in both label and feature spaces, thereby accounting for nearby targets and related groups while calibrating both label and learned feature distributions across attributes. Extensive experiments on common real-world DSR datasets that span computer vision, environmental sensing, and large language model (LLM) regression verify the superior performance of our strategies. Our work fills the gap in benchmarks and techniques for studying spurious correlations in continuous prediction.

AI.tldr: 本文定义了深度虚假回归（DSR）问题，针对连续预测中属性与标签之间的虚假相关性，提出利用标签空间和特征空间中虚假属性的相似性进行校准，在计算机视觉、环境感知和LLM回归等多个真实数据集上验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有虚假相关性研究主要集中在分类任务上，但许多真实世界任务需要连续预测（回归），而回归中不存在明确的类别边界或离散的组标签对。因此，需要专门研究回归任务中的虚假相关性问题。
AI.method: 利用虚假属性在标签空间和特征空间中的相似性，同时对标签分布和学到的特征分布进行跨属性校准，以处理邻近目标和相关组的虚假相关性。
AI.result: 在计算机视觉、环境感知和大语言模型回归等多个真实DSR数据集上，所提策略展现了优越的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该工作填补了连续预测中虚假相关性研究的基准和技术空白，为回归任务中的虚假相关性问题提供了有效的解决方案。

title: Adaptive Auto-Harness: Sustained Self-Improvement for Agentic System Deployment on Open-Ended Task Streams
summary: Auto-harness systems such as A-Evolve, GEPA, and Meta-Harness improve LLM agents by optimizing prompts, skills, tools, memories, and supporting infrastructure from execution feedback, but they are typically evaluated on fixed offline benchmarks. Real deployments instead present open-ended task streams: histories grow without a fixed endpoint, heterogeneous tasks require different harnesses, and problem distributions shift over time. These challenges make a single repeatedly and densely updated harness brittle, causing performance degradation as accuracy peaks early and then declines. This motivates sustained harness construction with task-wise adaptation. We introduce Adaptive Auto-Harness, a framework and system for such streams. The framework decomposes the gap to an oracle harness into evolution loss and adaptation loss. The system addresses these losses with a stateful multi-agent evolver, a harness tree with solve-time routing, and human-steering hooks for cases where history lacks the needed signal. Across prediction-market, security-competition, and event-forecasting streams, Adaptive Auto-Harness outperforms five existing auto-harness baselines and ablations attribute gains to better construction, routing, or targeted human steering. Code is available in https://github.com/A-EVO-Lab/AdaptiveHarness .

AI.tldr: 本文提出自适应自动装备框架（Adaptive Auto-Harness），针对开放任务流中固定离线评估的局限性，通过状态化多智能体进化器、装备树路由和人工引导机制，在三个真实场景中超越五种现有基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有自动装备系统在固定离线基准上表现良好，但实际部署面临开放式任务流：历史无限增长、异构任务需要不同装备、问题分布随时间偏移，导致单一密集更新的装备性能先升后降。
AI.method: 将装备与最优装备之间的差距分解为进化损失和适应损失；采用状态化多智能体进化器、装备树（含求解时路由）和人工引导机制来分别应对这两类损失。
AI.result: 在预测市场、安全竞赛和事件预测三个任务流上，自适应自动装备超越五种现有基线，消融实验证实了各模块的贡献。
AI.conclusion: 针对开放式任务流，任务级自适应装备构建比单一大规模更新更有效，人工引导在历史信号不足时发挥关键作用。

title: FLARE: Diffusion for Hybrid Language Model
summary: Autoregressive (AR) large language models (LLMs) have achieved broad practical success, but sequential decoding remains a key bottleneck for low-latency deployment. Recent efficient-inference work has progressed along two axes: reducing the cost of each model invocation through efficient architectures, and reducing serial decoding steps through parallel generation. Hybrid attention backbones address the former, while diffusion language models (dLLMs) pursue the latter via iterative parallel denoising. Combining these advantages remains challenging: AR-to-dLLM conversion often fails to preserve seed-checkpoint capability, and hybrid-attention recurrent states and masking constraints make diffusion training and serving nontrivial. We present FLARE, a systematic conversion framework for hybrid-attention LLMs. Our analysis identifies transfer data quality as the primary determinant of capability preservation, outweighing loss formulation and attention-mask design. The resulting framework combines a token-equal AR-and-diffusion objective, hardware-aware kernels, and unified inference, enabling one checkpoint to support both AR-style verified decoding and diffusion-style parallel denoising. Starting from strong AR checkpoints with limited post-training data, FLARE is competitive with leading open-source dLLMs across model scales and delivers consistent throughput gains over open-source dLLM baselines in single-GPU concurrent serving. Our results further suggest that practical dLLMs are limited not only by decoding algorithms, but also by transfer data quality and the training inefficiency of current block-diffusion objectives, motivating joint design of data, objectives, architectures, and inference systems.

AI.tldr: FLARE是一个系统化的转换框架，能将混合注意力架构的自回归大语言模型高效转换为扩散语言模型，通过联合AR与扩散训练目标，使单一检查点同时支持自回归验证解码和扩散式并行去噪，显著提升推理吞吐。
AI.motivation: 自回归大模型顺序解码延迟高，混合注意力架构与扩散语言模型分别从单步成本和多步并行两个方向优化推理效率，但二者难以结合：AR到dLLM转换常丢失预训练能力，且混合注意力的循环状态和掩码约束使扩散训练和服务复杂。
AI.method: 提出FLARE框架，包括：(1) token等价的AR与扩散联合训练目标；(2) 硬件感知的高效核函数；(3) 统一推理接口。核心发现是传输数据质量比损失函数和注意力掩码设计更重要。
AI.result: 在多种模型规模下，FLARE与领先开源dLLM竞争力相当，在单GPU并发服务中吞吐持续优于开源dLLM基线。实践dLLM的瓶颈不仅在于解码算法，还受限于传输数据质量和当前块扩散目标的训练低效。
AI.conclusion: FLARE证明了从强AR检查点通过有限后训练数据即可获得高性能dLLM，并指出未来应联合设计数据、目标函数、架构和推理系统以推动实用dLLM发展。

title: Tree-Guided Identify-Then-Exploit: A Unified Framework of Best Arm Identification and Regret Minimization for Dueling Bandits
summary: We study $N$-armed stochastic dueling bandits under the Condorcet-winner assumption, where three widely adopted objectives are considered: best-arm identification (BAI), weak regret, and strong regret. We propose Tree-Guided Identify-Then-Exploit (TG-ITE), the first unified framework to tackle all these objectives to our knowledge. Without requiring stronger assumptions, we propose a shared tree-guided identification approach to find a high-confidence incumbent within $O(N)$ comparisons. We further propose varied exploitation strategies to utilize this warm-start stage to optimize the specific objectives at hand. This methodology enables our approach to (1) achieve $O(N)$ sample complexity in BAI without commonly adopted stronger assumptions; (2) build the first winner-stays-style algorithm to achieve $O(N)$ weak regret; (3) enjoy the same $O(N \log T)$ guarantee as specialized strong-regret approaches; (4) realize the joint optimization of BAI and weak regret with $O(N)$ guarantees for both, eliminating the sub-optimal gap of $O(\log N)$ in the existing approach. Our results provide evidence that the trade-off between BAI and regret minimization is relatively benign in dueling bandits.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TG-ITE，首个统一解决Condorcet赢家假设下N臂随机决斗赌博机中BAI、弱遗憾和强遗憾三大目标的框架，通过树引导识别加不同利用策略，在多项指标上取得最优或持平的理论保证。
AI.motivation: 现有决斗赌博机研究通常针对BAI、弱遗憾或强遗憾单独设计算法，缺乏统一框架；且不同目标之间存在理论界限上的差距（如BAI与弱遗憾联合优化时存在O(log N)的次优间隙）。作者希望提出一个通用框架同时解决三大目标，并缩小这些差距。
AI.method: 提出Tree-Guided Identify-Then-Exploit (TG-ITE) 两阶段框架：(1) 树引导识别阶段，通过O(N)次比较高效找到高置信度的胜出者；(2) 针对不同目标设计不同的利用策略（如BAI目标、弱遗憾目标、强遗憾目标），利用预热阶段的结果来优化具体目标。
AI.result: (1) BAI任务达到O(N)样本复杂度，无需更强假设；(2) 首个基于胜者保持策略实现O(N)弱遗憾的算法；(3) 强遗憾达到O(N log T)的最优界；(4) BAI与弱遗憾联合优化实现O(N)双保证，消除了现有方法中O(log N)的次优间隙。
AI.conclusion: 决斗赌博机中BAI与遗憾最小化之间的权衡相对温和，不同目标可以统一框架下高效实现，为后续研究提供了理论基础。

title: Learning Implicit Bias in Generative Spaces for Accelerating Protein Dynamics Emulation
summary: Generative emulators of protein dynamics produce plausible trajectories at a fraction of the cost of molecular dynamics, but they inherit their training distribution and tend to revisit known states rather than reach rare ones under long-horizon extrapolation. Inspired by classical enhanced sampling, we introduce an implicit, history-dependent bias in the generative space of a pretrained emulator. Specifically, a history-aware score estimator augments the frozen emulator with a distance-weighted bias that steers reverse-time sampling away from previously generated structures, regularized by an environment-support term. To preserve structural validity at long horizons, a score-based refinement step re-projects drifted samples onto the data manifold using the frozen emulator. Our experiments demonstrate that the method (i) raises diversity by $35\%$ on DynamicPDB-80; (ii) on $12$ zero-shot Fast-Folding proteins, the learned bias alone reaches the unbiased emulator's coverage up to ${\sim}15\times$ faster, and pairing it with refinement reaches the coverage up to ${\sim}37\times$ faster while covering ${\sim}3\times$ as many low-energy states. Code will be released soon.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于历史依赖偏置的生成式蛋白质动力学模拟方法，通过距离加权偏置引导反向时间采样远离已生成结构，并利用分数细化步骤保持结构有效性，在多个基准上显著提升了多样性和稀有状态覆盖速度。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式蛋白质动力学模拟器虽然高效，但继承训练分布，在长时外推时倾向于重复访问已知状态而难以到达稀有状态，亟需一种能引导生成过程探索新构象的方法。
AI.method: 在预训练生成模拟器中引入隐式的历史依赖偏置：利用历史感知的分数估计器结合距离加权偏置引导反向时间采样远离已生成结构，并加入环境支撑项进行正则化；同时采用基于分数的细化步骤将漂移样本重新投影到数据流形上。
AI.result: 在DynamicPDB-80上多样性提升35%；在12个零样本Fast-Folding蛋白上，仅用偏置即可达到无偏模拟器覆盖速度的约15倍，结合细化后达到约37倍，且覆盖的低能状态数量约为3倍。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效提升了生成式模拟器在长时外推下的构象多样性和稀有状态探索能力，为高效蛋白质动力学模拟提供了新思路。

title: Mos-Gen: A Generative Molecular Framework for Mosquito Insecticide Design
summary: Mosquito-borne infectious diseases cause more than 700000 deaths worldwide each year. The long-term use of conventional chemical insecticides has induced serious resistance problems, creating an urgent need to develop novel, highly effective, and ecologically sustainable alternatives. While existing artificial intelligence approaches in this domain have focused primarily on activity prediction and classification, they leave a critical gap in the de~novo generation of novel molecular scaffolds. In this study, we propose Mos-Gen, a motif-aware generative collaborative framework that couples the pretrained molecular representation model Uni-Mol with a variational autoencoder (VAE), specifically tailored for the design of disulfide-containing allicin derivatives as mosquito insecticides. Among the generated candidates, fourteen compounds -- comprising nine predicted positives and five predicted negatives -- were selected for chemical synthesis and experimental validation. The hit rate among the predicted positives reached 78%, whereas none of the predicted negatives exhibited mosquitocidal activity. These experimental results fully validated the high-precision screening capability of the Mos-Gen framework.

AI.tldr: 提出Mos-Gen框架，结合Uni-Mol与VAE生成含二硫键的大蒜素衍生物作为蚊虫杀虫剂，实验验证阳性预测命中率78%。
AI.motivation: 传统化学杀虫剂长期使用导致严重抗药性问题，亟需开发新型高效且生态可持续的替代品；现有AI方法仅能进行活性预测与分类，缺乏对新分子骨架的从头生成能力。
AI.method: 提出Mos-Gen框架，将预训练分子表征模型Uni-Mol与变分自编码器（VAE）耦合，构建基序感知的生成式协作框架，专门用于含二硫键大蒜素衍生物的设计。
AI.result: 筛选出14个候选化合物（9个预测阳性、5个预测阴性）进行合成与验证，预测阳性命中率78%，预测阴性均无杀蚊活性。
AI.conclusion: 实验结果充分验证了Mos-Gen框架的高精度筛选能力，为新型蚊虫杀虫剂的从头设计提供了有效方案。

title: ContinuousBench: Can Differentially Private Synthetic Text Improve Capabilities?
comment: Datasets: https://huggingface.co/ContinuousBench ; Eval Harness: https://github.com/plau666/ContinuousBenchEval ; Blog post: https://peihanliu.com/posts/continuousbench.html
summary: Differentially private (DP) text synthesis promises to unlock sensitive corpora for model training, but it remains unclear whether DP synthetic data transmits genuinely new knowledge and capabilities present only in those corpora. This is because existing evaluations rely on tasks that are nearly solvable without training, so strong benchmark performance does not establish that DP synthesis can substitute original data access. Thus, we introduce ContinuousBench, a continuously and automatically-regenerated benchmark that measures capability gain from DP synthetic text. Each quarter, a new release pairs a never-before-seen training corpus with a derived QA set, constructed to be: (1) unsolvable sans-corpus; and (2) learnable under DP, as the tested knowledge is supported by hundreds of independent records. Researchers produce DP synthetic data from the training corpus and run our standardized training and evaluation harness on their synthetic data to measure gains. We instantiate two tracks: Geminon, a procedurally-generated dataset about fictional creatures; and News, a stream of newly crawled public news articles. Although standard benchmarks are nearly saturated, on ContinuousBench we find that non-private synthesis transfers substantial knowledge from the original corpus, while state-of-the-art DP synthesis methods generally fail to do so, even at $\varepsilon=100$.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ContinuousBench，一个持续更新的基准测试，用于评估差分隐私文本合成能否真正传递训练语料库中的新知识。实验发现，非私有合成能有效传递知识，但现有最优的差分隐私合成方法即使在ε=100时也基本失败。
AI.motivation: 现有的DP文本合成评估使用近乎无需训练即可解决的基准任务，强性能并不能证明DP合成可以替代原始数据访问。因此需要一个新的基准来真正衡量DP合成能否传递语料库中的新知识和能力。
AI.method: 构建ContinuousBench，每季度更新一次，包含全新的训练语料库和衍生QA集。QA集设计为：(1)没有语料库无法解决；(2)在DP下可学习（知识由数百条独立记录支持）。包含两个赛道：Geminon（程序生成的虚构生物数据集）和News（新爬取的公共新闻文章流）。
AI.result: 非私有合成能从原始语料库传递大量知识；而最先进的DP合成方法即使在ε=100时也普遍无法有效传递知识。
AI.conclusion: 现有DP文本合成方法在传递真实新知识方面效果不佳，ContinuousBench为评估DP合成的实际能力提供了更严格的基准。

title: A Theoretical Framework for Self-Play Theorem Proving Algorithms
summary: Self-play, a type of training algorithm that enables a model to self-improve, has recently shown promising empirical results in the context of formal theorem proving using Large Language Models (LLMs). (Dong & Ma, 2025) instantiate self-play with two cooperating agents: a prover, which proves theorems, and a conjecturer, which generates new theorems as a curriculum to the prover. In this paper, we provide a theoretical framework for understanding the self-improvement capabilities of self-play algorithms for theorem proving. First, we formalize the set of theorems as a graph, with nodes as theorems and edges between pairs of theorems with similar semantics. We introduce a set of primitive assumptions that characterize the guarantees of a trained prover and how a conjecturer can access the structure of the graph. Second, we show that if the underlying graph of theorems is well-connected, then a prover-conjecturer system, where the conjecturing algorithm is based on a reversible random walk, is sufficient to grow the set of proved theorems exponentially. Third, motivated by an issue encountered empirically by self-play algorithms, where the conjecturer tends to generate artificially complex and non-fundamental theorems, we propose a diversity measure for a training distribution of theorems generated by a conjecturer and an improved conjecturing algorithm that locally maximizes this diversity measure, by computing the diffusion similarity between neighboring theorems in the theorem graph. Finally, we describe a method to compute the diffusion similarity by using contrastive learning to embed nodes into Euclidean space and then computing the inner-product between embeddings.

AI.tldr: 本文为定理证明中的自我博弈算法提供了理论框架，证明了在良好连接的定理图上，基于可逆随机游走的猜测者-证明者系统能够指数级扩展已证明定理集，并提出了通过对比学习嵌入来最大化多样性的改进猜测算法。
AI.motivation: 自我博弈算法（如Dong & Ma, 2025）在形式化定理证明中展现出 promising 的实证效果，但缺乏理论理解。同时，现有算法面临猜测者倾向于生成非基础复杂定理的实际问题，亟需理论指导与改进。
AI.method: 首先将定理集形式化为图结构，提出基础假设刻画证明者和猜测者的能力保证。其次，证明在良好连接的定理图上，基于可逆随机游走的猜测算法可指数级增长已证明定理集。然后，提出多样性度量指标和基于扩散相似性的局部最大化算法。最后，用对比学习将定理嵌入欧氏空间，通过内积计算扩散相似性。
AI.result: 理论上证明了在良好连接的定理图上，自我博弈算法能够实现已证明定理集的指数级增长；提出了改进的猜测算法，可局部最大化生成定理的多样性。
AI.conclusion: 本文为自我博弈定理证明算法提供了理论支撑，并针对实践中出现的多样性退化问题提出了可行的改进方案。

title: Continual Learning as a Multiphase Moving-Boundary Problem
summary: Continual learning struggles to balance retaining past knowledge with absorbing new tasks. Stefan-CL elegantly resolves this stability-plasticity dilemma through the physics of melting. It frames consolidated knowledge as a protected "solid" and unused capacity as an adaptable "liquid." As the network learns, this boundary expands, governed by a "latent heat" tuning dial. By mathematically freezing the learned interior, Stefan-CL cuts forgetting to near zero, matching memory-heavy baselines without storing raw data, forging a beautiful, physics-grounded path for AI.

AI.tldr: Stefan-CL通过借鉴物理学中的熔化概念，将模型知识分为“固态”（已巩固知识）和“液态”（未使用容量）两部分，通过“潜热”调节边界扩展，从而优雅地解决了持续学习中的稳定性-可塑性困境，几乎消除了遗忘问题，且无需存储原始数据。
AI.motivation: 持续学习面临着一个核心矛盾：如何在吸收新任务的同时不遗忘旧知识（稳定性-可塑性困境）。现有方法要么牺牲稳定性，要么需要大量存储原始数据。
AI.method: Stefan-CL借鉴物理学中固液相变（熔化/凝固）的概念：将已学到的巩固知识视为“固态”区域（受保护），未使用的容量视为“液态”区域（可灵活适应新任务）。随着学习进行，固液边界根据“潜热”参数动态扩展，数学上冻结已学习的内核，使模型在吸收新知识时几乎不干扰旧知识。
AI.result: 遗忘率几乎降至为零，性能与需要大量存储原始数据的记忆密集型基线方法相当，但Stefan-CL无需保存任何原始数据。
AI.conclusion: Stefan-CL通过物理学启发的优雅方法为持续学习提供了一条新路径，在不存储原始数据的情况下实现了几乎无遗忘的学习，展示了跨学科灵感对AI进步的潜在价值。

title: Task-Induced Representational Invariances Depend on Learning Objective in Deep RL
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has long served as a model for goal-directed animal behavior in neuroscience. Modern deep RL has shown remarkable success across many domains, further strengthening this connection. The ability to learn abstract representations of high-dimensional state spaces underlies much of this success. However, theoretical understanding of these learned representations remains limited, hindering direct comparisons between models and animal learning. We address this gap by analyzing deep RL representations through the lens of MDP reduction theory. Investigating canonical RL algorithms in a navigation task, we find that even when performance is comparable, the value-based method (DQN) learns representations that are invariant to MDP homomorphism symmetries, while the policy-gradient method (PPO) learns representations invariant to action symmetries. These differences emerge consistently across domains, have downstream consequences for transfer learning, and appear in LLMs in a prompt-dependent manner. Our findings provide a principled approach to comparing learned representations across RL algorithms, with demonstrated practical implications and possible insights for neural coding in the brain.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过MDP约简理论分析深度强化学习表示，发现DQN学习对MDP同态对称性不变的表示，而PPO学习对动作对称性不变的表示，这些差异影响迁移学习，并出现在LLM中。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习在神经科学中作为目标导向动物行为的模型，但其学到的抽象表征的理论理解有限，阻碍了模型与动物学习之间的直接比较。
AI.method: 利用MDP约简理论分析深度RL算法（DQN和PPO）在导航任务中学到的表征，研究它们对对称性的不变性，并扩展到其他领域和LLM。
AI.result: DQN学到的表征对MDP同态对称性不变，PPO学到的表征对动作对称性不变；这些差异在不同领域一致出现，影响迁移学习，并在LLM中以提示依赖的方式呈现。
AI.conclusion: 研究提供了比较不同RL算法学到的表征的原则性方法，具有实际应用意义，并可能为大脑神经编码提供洞见。

title: G2LoRA: Gradient Orthogonal Low-Rank Adaptation Framework for Graph Continual Learning on Text-Attributed Graphs
summary: LLM-as-Aligner has emerged as a prevalent pre-training paradigm for Text-Attributed Graphs(TAGS), aligning graph and text modalities into a shared embedding space via CLIP-style contrastive learning. While effective on individual downstream tasks, we observe severe catastrophic forgetting when such models are sequentially fine-tuned on streaming tasks. Although parameter-efficient fine-tuning alleviates forgetting to some extent, it remains insufficient to resolve task interference and ineffective knowledge transfer. In this work, we study graph continual learning for LLM-as-Aligner models on TAGs, with the goal of mitigating interference while promoting positive transfer across tasks. This setting introduces two fundamental challenges: (1) heterogeneous downstream tasks induce shifting optimization objectives, hindering unified fine-tuning; and (2) graph and text encoders exhibit different sensitivities to adaptation, making uncoordinated updates prone to misalignment. To address these challenges, we propose G2LoRA, a continual learning framework for TAGs. G2LoRA unifies node-, link-, and graph-level tasks under a single graph--text alignment objective, and enables consistent optimization across domain/class/task incremental modes. To reduce task interference while encouraging positive transfer, G2LoRA performs category-aware gradient projection in structured subspaces, resolving conflicting updates and enabling conditional backward transfer to balance forward and backward knowledge flow. To further prevent cross-modal drift, G2LoRA introduces gradient magnitude modulation to coordinate update rates between graph and text encoders. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate that G2LoRA consistently outperforms strong baselines across different backbone architectures, achieving superior continual performance and transferability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出G2LoRA框架，用于解决LLM-as-Aligner模型在图属性文本数据上的持续学习问题，通过类别感知梯度投影和梯度幅度调制缓解灾难性遗忘并促进正向迁移。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM-as-Aligner模型在流式任务上顺序微调时存在严重的灾难性遗忘，参数高效微调虽能缓解但不足以解决任务干扰和知识迁移不足的问题。
AI.method: 提出G2LoRA框架：(1) 将节点级、链接级和图级任务统一为图-文本对齐目标；(2) 类别感知梯度投影，在结构子空间中解决冲突更新并实现条件性反向迁移；(3) 梯度幅度调制，协调图编码器和文本编码器的更新速率，防止跨模态漂移。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，G2LoRA在不同骨干架构下均优于强基线方法，取得了卓越的持续学习性能和可迁移性。
AI.conclusion: G2LoRA有效解决了LLM-as-Aligner在TAGs持续学习中的任务干扰和跨模态漂移问题，实现了正向迁移与遗忘抑制的平衡。

title: Beyond the Simplex: Balanced Prototype Geometry for Scorer-Agnostic Open-Set Recognition
summary:
Open-set recognition (OSR) requires a classifier to reject inputs from unseen classes which is essential in safety-critical settings such as medical imaging. Simplex based methods, which fix class prototypes at the vertices of a regular simplex and then reject via a distance-ratio score, perform well empirically but lack theoretical justification, and existing analysis applies only when the embedding dimension d is at least C-1, which is the regime in which a regular simplex exists.
  We give a theoretical account of simplex-ratio OSR that holds in every embedding dimension, including d < C-1. Our analysis centers on balanced equal-norm codes: prototype configurations with equal lengths and zero sum, which exist for all d >= 2 and include the regular simplex as a special case. For these codes we show that an auxiliary squared ratio score has sublevel sets that are exact unions of Euclidean balls, which in turn bracket the acceptance region of the operational score; and we prove a sharp dichotomy: the prototypes attain one-distance symmetry, behaving like a regular simplex, if and only if d >= C-1, with controlled degradation governed by an explicit defect parameter below that threshold. We further show the false-acceptance rate decays exponentially in d under natural isotropy assumptions, and that the operational score is globally Lipschitz with compact acceptance regions.
  Empirically, we study balanced prototype geometry as both an analytic tool and a representation-learning prior, rather than as a stand-alone state-of-the-art detector. Across CIFAR and MedMNIST open-set splits, the geometry provides useful structure, but OSR performance remains strongly dependent on the scoring rule: raw ratio scores typically underperform nearest-neighbor and logit-based alternatives.

AI.tldr: 本文为开放集识别（OSR）中的单纯形比值方法提供了理论分析，证明了平衡等范数编码（包括正则单纯形）在任意嵌入维度下的几何性质，并展示了性能依赖于评分规则而非单纯形几何本身。
AI.motivation: 现有基于单纯形的OSR方法在d≥C-1时有理论支持，但当嵌入维度d小于类别数C-1时缺乏理论解释，本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 引入平衡等范数编码（balanced equal-norm codes）作为统一框架，分析辅助平方比值评分函数的子水平集几何结构，证明原型间距离对称性的二分性质，并推导误接受率的指数衰减界。
AI.result: 证明了d≥C-1时原型具有正则单纯形的完美对称性；d<C-1时存在可量化的退化；误接受率随维度d指数衰减；但实验表明原始比值评分不如近邻和基于logit的替代方法。
AI.conclusion: 单纯形几何为OSR提供了有用的分析工具和表示学习先验，但实际检测性能主要取决于评分规则的设计，单纯形几何本身并非最优的检测器。

title: Segment-driven Structural Induction and Semantic Alignment for Heterogeneous Tabular Representation
summary: Real-world domains often contain heterogeneous tables whose headers vary while their underlying attribute semantics are shared, making it difficult to induce domain-specialized semantics from table-local evidence alone. Existing encoders model parts of this problem, but often underuse column-level value distributions and apply uniform objectives across attributes with different semantic roles. We propose NAVI, a segment-centric pretraining framework that treats each header-value pair as the unit for aggregating schema-level structural evidence and column-level distributional evidence. We realize this design through Masked Segment Modeling and Entropy-driven Segment Alignment, which jointly enforce structured header-value coupling and semantic alignment across stable and instance-specific attributes. Experiments on heterogeneous in-domain tables show improved reconstruction, semantic consistency, and downstream utility across evaluation settings overall.

AI.tldr: NAVI是一个面向异构表格的段级预训练框架，通过将每个标题-值对作为基本单元，联合建模模式级结构证据和列级分布证据，显著提升了表格重建、语义一致性和下游任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的异构表格标题多样但底层属性语义共享，现有方法难以仅从局部证据归纳领域专用语义；同时现有编码器未充分利用列级值分布，且对不同语义角色的属性使用统一目标。
AI.method: 提出NAVI框架，采用段级（segment-centric）预训练，以标题-值对为聚合单元；通过掩蔽段建模（Masked Segment Modeling）和熵驱动段对齐（Entropy-driven Segment Alignment）两个目标，联合强化结构化标题-值耦合及稳定属性与实例特定属性间的语义对齐。
AI.result: 在异构领域内表格上的实验表明，NAVI在重建、语义一致性和下游任务实用性方面均取得了改进。
AI.conclusion: NAVI通过段级建模有效解决了异构表格的语义归纳难题，为复杂表格语义理解提供了新的预训练范式。

title: Private and Stable Test-Time Adaptation with Differential Privacy
summary: Test-time adaptation (TTA) can reduce error on new and different data by updating the model on these inputs during inference. However, these updates raise the issue of privacy w.r.t. the testing data, because the model parameters now depend on all past inputs. To control this privacy risk, we cast multiple popular TTA methods (Tent, EATA, SAR, DeYO, and COME) into differential privacy (DP) forms that apply per-sample gradient clipping and Gaussian noise for all updates. On ImageNet-C, our DP-TTA methods provide adequate privacy at small cost to accuracy, and in the low-privacy regime the clipping mechanism of DP can even improve the accuracy and stability of adaptation in the continual setting. These improvements to privacy and accuracy come at only modest computational overhead. These first results on private TTA raise awareness of the issue, inform the development of more private test-time updates, and identify per-sample clipping as an effective technique for improving the accuracy and stability of adaptation.

AI.tldr: 本文首次将测试时自适应（TTA）方法纳入差分隐私（DP）框架，通过逐样本梯度裁剪和高斯噪声在保持隐私的同时，发现低隐私下DP裁剪机制甚至能提升持续自适应场景的准确性和稳定性。
AI.motivation: 测试时自适应（TTA）在推理阶段更新模型会泄露测试数据的隐私信息，因为模型参数依赖于所有历史输入。现有TTA方法缺乏对隐私风险的控制，亟需一种隐私保护机制。
AI.method: 将Tent、EATA、SAR、DeYO和COME五种主流TTA方法转化为差分隐私（DP）形式，核心是引入逐样本梯度裁剪和高斯噪声扰动，并在ImageNet-C数据集上评估隐私-准确性权衡。
AI.result: DP-TTA方法在适度牺牲准确率的情况下提供了足够的隐私保护；在低隐私预算下，DP的裁剪机制反而提升了持续自适应场景的准确性和稳定性，且计算开销微小。
AI.conclusion: 该工作首次揭示TTA的隐私风险，提出可行的隐私化改造方案，并指出了逐样本裁剪在提高自适应稳定性方面的额外价值，为后续隐私保护型测试时自适应研究奠定基础。

title: HMPO: Hybrid Median-length Policy Optimization for Chain-of-Thought Compression
summary: Large language models achieve remarkable performance via extended chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning, yet this lengthy process incurs substantial inference overhead. Existing CoT compression methods struggle with inflexible manual length budgets, computationally expensive multi-stage training pipelines, and fragile scalability restricted to small models. We propose HMPO (Hybrid Median-length Policy Optimization), a cost-effective, single-stage reinforcement learning framework. HMPO efficiently compresses CoT via three synergistic components: an adaptive median-based budget derived from successful rollouts to eliminate manual tuning, a cosine-decay token reward for smooth length penalization, and a multiplicative reward formulation that substantially mitigates trivial reward hacking by strictly prioritizing answer correctness. Trained exclusively on mathematical data, HMPO generalizes seamlessly across math, code, science, and instruction-following tasks. Extensive experiments scaling from 9B to 122B parameters across dense and Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures demonstrate that HMPO achieves 19%--46% token compression with negligible accuracy degradation, all while drastically reducing training costs compared to existing multi-stage baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出HMPO，一种单阶段强化学习框架，通过自适应中位数预算、余弦衰减令牌奖励和乘法奖励公式，在不显著降低准确率的情况下实现19%-46%的CoT令牌压缩，并在9B到122B参数规模的模型上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有CoT压缩方法存在手动长度预算不灵活、多阶段训练计算成本高、仅适用于小模型等局限性，需要一种更高效、可扩展的压缩方法。
AI.method: 提出HMPO框架，包含三个核心组件：基于成功轨迹的自适应中位数预算（免手动调参）、余弦衰减令牌奖励（平滑长度惩罚）、乘法奖励公式（优先保证答案正确性，抑制奖励黑客行为）。
AI.result: 在9B到122B参数的密集和MoE架构上实现19%-46%的令牌压缩，准确率下降可忽略不计；训练成本远低于多阶段基线方法；在数学、代码、科学和指令遵循任务上均表现出良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: HMPO是一种低成本、单阶段的CoT压缩方案，能够高效压缩推理过程且保持性能，具有良好的可扩展性和跨任务泛化能力。

title: Randomized Least Squares Value Iteration itself is Joint Differentially Private
summary: As reinforcement learning (RL) increasingly applies to sensitive domains, such as health care and recommendation systems, privacy-preserving techniques have become essential to protect users' sensitive information. We investigate privacy-preserving RL under an episodic setting, focusing on algorithms based on randomized exploration, such as Randomized Least Squares Value Iteration (RLSVI). The overall goal is to study how randomized exploration interacts with the injected noise required by privacy mechanisms. In this work, we show a new privacy analysis that characterizes how the noise in RLSVI set for exploration simultaneously provides privacy protection. Specifically, we prove that RLSVI is $(\varepsilon(δ),δ)$-joint differentially private in tabular MDP as is with $\varepsilon(δ) = \frac{2AK}{H^2\log(2HSA)} + 2\sqrt{\frac{2AK\log(1/δ)}{H^2\log(2HSA)}}$, where $S$ and $A$ are the number of states and actions respectively, $H$ is the length of an episode and $K$ is the number of episodes.

AI.tldr: 本文研究强化学习中的隐私保护问题，证明随机探索算法RLSVI在表格型MDP中天然满足联合差分隐私，无需额外添加噪声即可同时实现探索和隐私保护。
AI.motivation: 随着强化学习应用于医疗、推荐系统等敏感领域，保护用户隐私信息变得至关重要，需要研究随机探索与隐私保护机制之间的相互作用。
AI.method: 对基于随机探索的RLSVI算法进行隐私分析，推导其在表格型MDP下的联合差分隐私界，无需额外注入噪声。
AI.result: 证明RLSVI是$(\varepsilon(δ),δ)$-联合差分隐私的，其中$\varepsilon(δ) = \frac{2AK}{H^2\log(2HSA)} + 2\sqrt{\frac{2AK\log(1/δ)}{H^2\log(2HSA)}}$。
AI.conclusion: 随机探索算法RLSVI中用于探索的噪声可以同时提供隐私保护，实现了探索与隐私的有机结合。

title: Flow-Transformed Implicit Processes for Function-Space Variational Inference
comment: 24 pages, 4 figures, 10 tables. Pre-print submitted for revision
summary: Implicit-process priors define distributions over functions through flexible generative mechanisms, making them attractive for Bayesian function-space modelling. However, performing posterior inference with such priors is challenging because their induced function-space distributions are typically not available in closed form. One practical strategy is to approximate the prior using a finite collection of sampled functions, and then represent posterior functions as learned combinations of these samples. Existing approaches commonly place a Gaussian variational distribution over the combination weights. While tractable, this choice limits the shapes of posterior uncertainty that can be represented, especially when the true posterior is asymmetric, heavy-tailed, or multimodal. We propose Flow-Transformed Implicit Processes (FTIP), a variational inference method that makes this finite-dimensional function-space approximation more expressive. Instead of using a Gaussian distribution over the combination weights, FTIP uses a normalizing flow to define a richer variational distribution. This induces a flexible posterior distribution over functions while preserving tractable optimization. We train the model using a Black-Box α objective, allowing us to compare mass-covering and mode-seeking variational behaviour. Experiments show that FTIP captures asymmetric and multimodal posterior structure in function space that Gaussian coefficient approximations tend to smooth or collapse.

AI.tldr: 提出FTIP方法，用归一化流替代高斯分布对组合权重进行变分推断，从而在函数空间中表达非对称、重尾或多模态的后验不确定性。
AI.motivation: 隐过程先验的函数空间后验通常非对称、重尾或多模态，而现有高斯变分分布限制了后验不确定性的表达能力。
AI.method: FTIP使用归一化流定义组合权重的变分分布，并通过Black-Box α目标进行训练，兼顾质量覆盖与模式寻找行为。
AI.result: 实验表明FTIP能捕获高斯方法平滑或塌陷的非对称和多模态后验结构。
AI.conclusion: FTIP通过归一化流增强了有限维函数空间近似的表达能力，在保持可优化性的同时提升了后验灵活性。

title: A Closer Look at In-Distribution vs. Out-of-Distribution Accuracy for Open-Set Test-time Adaptation
summary: Open-set test-time adaptation (TTA) updates models on new data in the presence of input shifts and unknown output classes. While recent methods have made progress on improving in-distribution (InD) accuracy for known classes, their ability to accurately detect out-of-distribution (OOD) unknown classes remains underexplored. We benchmark robust and open-set TTA methods (SAR, OSTTA, UniEnt, and SoTTA) on the standard corruption benchmarks of CIFAR-10-C at the small scale and ImageNet-C at the large scale. For CIFAR-10-C, we use OOD data from SVHN and CIFAR-100 in their respective corrupted forms of SVHN-C and CIFAR-100-C. For ImageNet-C, we use OOD data from ImageNet-O and Textures in their respective corrupted forms of ImageNet-O-C and Textures-C. ImageNet-O is nearer to ImageNet, as unknown but related object classes (like ''garlic bread'' vs. ''hot dog'' for food, or ''highway'' vs. ''dam'' for infrastructure), while Textures is farther from ImageNet, as non-object patterns (like ''cracked'' mud, ''porous'' sponge, ''veined'' leaves). We evaluate the accuracy and confidence of TTA methods for InD vs. OOD recognition on CIFAR-10-C and ImageNet-C. We verify the accuracy of each method's own OOD detection technique on CIFAR-10-C. We also evaluate on ImageNet-C and report both accuracy and standard OOD detection metrics. We further examine more realistic settings, in which the proportions and rates of OOD data can vary. To explore the trade-off between InD recognition and OOD rejection, we propose a new baseline that replaces softmax/multi-class output with sigmoid/multi-label output. Our analysis shows for the first time that current open-set TTA methods struggle to balance InD and OOD accuracy and that they only imperfectly filter OOD data for their own adaptation updates.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了开放集测试时自适应方法在分布内识别与分布外检测之间的权衡，发现现有方法难以同时兼顾两者，并提出了一种基于sigmoid多标签输出的新基线。
AI.motivation: 现有开放集TTA方法主要关注提升已知类别的分布内准确率，而对未知类别的分布外检测能力研究不足，缺乏系统性评估和权衡分析。
AI.method: 在CIFAR-10-C和ImageNet-C上基准测试多种开放集TTA方法（SAR、OSTTA、UniEnt、SoTTA），使用SVHN-C、CIFAR-100-C、ImageNet-O-C、Textures-C作为OOD数据，并引入sigmoid多标签输出基线来探索InD识别与OOD拒绝的权衡。
AI.result: 现有开放集TTA方法在平衡InD和OOD准确率方面表现不佳，对OOD数据的过滤不完善；提出的sigmoid多标签基线展示了更好的权衡潜力。
AI.conclusion: 当前开放集TTA方法无法有效兼顾分布内识别与分布外检测，需要设计新的方法来解决这一权衡问题。

title: Why Do Time Series Models Need Long Context Windows?
summary: Modern deep learning models for forecasting groups of time series rely on increasingly longer observation windows. However, the benefit of increasing the window size is often simply attributed to capturing long-range dependencies, and broader discussion on how global forecasting models leverage input observations has been limited. In this paper, we show that forecasting groups of time series involves two objectives: (i) generative process identification (GPI), i.e., inferring the specific process generating the input sequence, and (ii) conditional forecasting (CF), i.e., predicting future values given input observations. From this perspective, optimal predictions can be interpreted as an average over plausible data-generating processes, weighted by their likelihood given the input window. This suggests another explanation for the benefits of long context windows: they reduce the uncertainty about which specific process is generating the input time series during operation. We prove that even for processes with memory length $P$, an input window size strictly larger than $P$ is necessary to achieve the minimum attainable error. Finally, we show how decoupling GPI and CF can improve computational scalability without compromising accuracy. Experiments on synthetic and real-world data validate our insights and their relevance for designing forecasting architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示时间序列预测中长输入窗口的另一个作用：减少生成过程识别的不确定性，并证明即使过程记忆长度为P，输入窗口需大于P才能达到最小误差。同时提出解耦生成过程识别与条件预测可提升计算效率。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习预测模型倾向于使用更长的观测窗口，但对其作用的理解仅限于"捕捉长程依赖"，缺乏对全局预测模型如何利用输入观测的更深入讨论。
AI.method: 将时间序列预测分解为两个目标：生成过程识别（GPI）和条件预测（CF）；从贝叶斯角度解释最优预测为各生成过程按其似然加权平均；通过理论证明输入窗口需大于记忆长度P才能达到最小误差；提出解耦GPI和CF的策略。
AI.result: 理论证明即使过程记忆长度为P，输入窗口大小必须严格大于P才能达到最小可达误差；解耦GPI和CF可在不牺牲精度的情况下提升计算可扩展性；合成数据与真实数据实验验证了上述见解。
AI.conclusion: 长输入窗口的益处不仅在于捕捉长程依赖，更在于减少对生成过程识别的不确定性；解耦GPI和CF为设计更具可扩展性的预测架构提供了新方向。

title: Evaluating Real-World Generalizability of Algorithm Selection Models
summary: Algorithm Selection (AS) aims to automatically identify the most suitable optimization algorithm for a given problem instance by leveraging measurable problem characteristics and historical performance data. In this study, we investigate the generalization ability of AS models across both synthetic and real-world optimization landscapes. We consider two widely used academic benchmark suites (BBOB and CEC) and two real-world problem sets (robotics trajectory optimization tasks and unmanned aerial vehicle path-planning problems). Through a systematic cross-benchmark evaluation, we analyze how AS models transfer between domains, identify where generalization succeeds or breaks down, and highlight the challenges that arise when applying AS in realistic, domain-specific contexts. Our findings provide insights into the robustness of current AS approaches and inform the development of more reliable, broadly applicable AS systems for real-world optimization.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了算法选择（AS）模型在合成基准（BBOB、CEC）与真实世界优化问题（机器人轨迹规划、无人机路径规划）之间的泛化能力，通过跨基准评估揭示了AS模型在不同领域间迁移的成功与失败场景，并为构建更稳健的AS系统提供了见解。
AI.motivation: 现有AS研究多局限于合成基准测试，对其在真实世界优化问题中的泛化能力缺乏系统性理解，因此本文旨在探究AS模型从合成域到真实域的迁移表现。
AI.method: 采用两个经典学术基准套件（BBOB和CEC）和两个真实问题集（机器人轨迹优化、无人机路径规划），通过系统的跨基准评估实验，分析AS模型在域间的迁移表现。
AI.result: 揭示了AS模型在不同领域间泛化成功与失败的具体情况，识别了在真实应用场景中应用AS所面临的挑战。
AI.conclusion: 本文为当前AS方法的鲁棒性提供了实证见解，并为开发更可靠、适用范围更广的AS系统指明了方向。

title: OpenWebRL: Demystifying Online Multi-turn Reinforcement Learning for Visual Web Agents
summary: Building capable visual web agents requires long-horizon reasoning, precise grounding, and robust interaction with dynamic real-world websites. Despite rapid progress, the strongest systems remain largely proprietary, while open agents still depend heavily on supervised post-training over large collections of curated web trajectories. This dependence creates a major scalability bottleneck: high-quality demonstrations are expensive to collect, and static datasets offer limited coverage of the diverse, ever-changing open web. Although online RL has shown promise for text-based agents, its potential for training visual web agents directly on live websites remains largely underexplored. In this paper, we introduce OpenWebRL, an open framework for training visual web agents with online multi-turn RL on real websites. OpenWebRL covers the full training pipeline, including scalable live-browser infrastructure, supervised initialization, multimodal context management, trajectory-level success judging, and efficient multi-turn policy optimization. Using this framework, we train OpenWebRL-4B, which establishes a new open-source state of the art on challenging live-web benchmarks. With only 0.4K initialization trajectories and 2.2K open-ended RL training tasks, OpenWebRL-4B achieves 67.0% success on Online-Mind2Web and 64.0% on DeepShop, outperforming prior open agents of similar or larger scale and remaining competitive with proprietary systems including OpenAI CUA and Gemini CUA. Beyond strong benchmark performance, we systematically study the key design choices that make online RL effective for visual web agents, and analyze how RL improves agentic reasoning. Overall, our work offers a practical path toward building more capable, reproducible, and cost-efficient open web agents. We will release our training data, models, and code to support future research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OpenWebRL框架，用于在真实网站上通过在线多轮强化学习训练视觉网络智能体。基于该框架训练的OpenWebRL-4B模型仅需少量数据即可达到开源最优性能，与闭源系统竞争力相当。
AI.motivation: 现有开源视觉网络智能体严重依赖大规模监督后训练和人工收集的轨迹数据，导致可扩展性瓶颈（高质量数据昂贵、静态数据集覆盖率有限）。在线RL在文本智能体中已展现潜力，但在视觉网络智能体上的应用尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 提出OpenWebRL框架，涵盖完整训练流程：可扩展的实时浏览器基础设施、监督初始化、多模态上下文管理、轨迹级成功判定、高效多轮策略优化。基于此框架训练OpenWebRL-4B模型。
AI.result: OpenWebRL-4B仅用0.4K初始化轨迹和2.2K开放RL训练任务，在Online-Mind2Web上达67.0%、DeepShop上达64.0%的成功率，超越同规模或更大规模的开源智能体，与OpenAI CUA和Gemini CUA等闭源系统竞争力相当。
AI.conclusion: 在线RL能有效提升视觉网络智能体的推理能力，OpenWebRL为构建更强大、可复现且成本高效的开源网络智能体提供了实用路径。

title: Realistic noise synthesis reduces bias and improves tissue microstructure estimation with supervised machine learning
summary: Diffusion MRI enables non-invasive probing of tissue microstructure, but accurate parameter estimation is challenged by noise-related effects. In supervised machine learning frameworks trained on simulated data, discrepancies between the noise characteristics of simulated and acquired signals introduce a form of covariate shift, whereby the input signal distribution differs between training and inference. We investigated the impact of this mismatch on microstructure parameter estimation and propose a realistic noise synthesis (RNS) framework to mitigate it. RNS incorporates both the Rician expectation and the effective post-processing noise variance into simulated training signals. The Rician expectation was modelled using a noise standard deviation estimated with MPPCA, while the effective standard deviation was derived from spherical harmonic residuals of preprocessed data. The method was evaluated using the cylinder-zeppelin and the SANDI models on simulated datasets across multiple SNR levels and on in vivo diffusion data with repeated acquisitions. Sensitivity to noise misestimation was also assessed. Ignoring magnitude-induced noise effects during training produced systematic, SNR-dependent parameter bias, particularly at low SNR. Incorporating the Rician expectation substantially reduced bias to the level of noise-aware nonlinear least-squares fitting. Modelling the effective standard deviation further improved precision. Performance was largely independent of regression architecture but sensitive to accurate noise estimation. These findings demonstrate that realistic noise modelling in simulated training data mitigates signal-domain covariate shift and is essential for unbiased supervised microstructure estimation, particularly in low-SNR regimes associated with high b-values or high spatial resolution.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种**现实噪声合成（RNS）框架**，通过在模拟训练数据中融入Rician期望和有效后处理噪声方差，解决了扩散MRI微观结构参数估计中因训练与推理信号分布不匹配（协变量偏移）导致的系统偏差问题，尤其在低SNR场景下显著提升了估计的准确性和精度。
AI.motivation: 扩散MRI在微观结构参数估计中，监督学习依赖模拟数据训练，但模拟信号与真实采集信号的**噪声特性存在差异**（协变量偏移），导致参数估计出现系统性偏差，尤其是在低SNR条件下。现有方法未充分解决这一噪声失配问题。
AI.method: 提出**现实噪声合成（RNS）框架**：1）利用MPPCA估计的噪声标准差建模**Rician期望**；2）从球谐残差中提取**有效后处理噪声方差**。将两者融入模拟训练信号，并使用cylinder-zeppelin和SANDI模型在多个SNR水平及in vivo数据上评估。
AI.result: 忽略幅度噪声效应导致**系统性、SNR依赖的参数偏差**（尤其在低SNR下）。引入Rician期望后，偏差降至与噪声感知非线性最小二乘拟合相当的水平；进一步建模有效标准差则提升了精度。该方法对回归架构不敏感，但依赖准确的噪声估计。
AI.conclusion: 在模拟训练数据中进行**现实噪声建模**能够有效缓解信号域的协变量偏移，是实现**无偏监督微观结构估计**的关键，特别是在高b值或高空间分辨率的低SNR场景下。

title: Ablating Archetypes: The Stability of Archetypal SAEs is an Artifact of Initialization and Metric Design
summary: Dictionary learning with sparse autoencoders (SAEs) produces overcomplete bases from neural network activations that are often interpretable and reduces polysemanticity. However, features from SAEs vary substantially across random seeds -- a problem known as instability. Archetypal SAEs (Fel et al., 2025) were proposed as a general dictionary-learning intervention for more reliable concept extraction, and report more stable dictionaries at the end of training. We demonstrate that the stability claimed by archetypal SAEs is a result of setting identical initialization across multiple runs. Through our analyses, we attempt to clarify two distinct notions in mechanistic interpretability that may be ambiguously used: stability is agreement between two independently trained models, whereas stabilization is the convergence of independently initialized runs toward a common solution. This distinction is critical for mechanistic interpretability of natural language processing (NLP), where feature stability is increasingly used as evidence that SAE features are reusable units of analysis. Experiments from archetypal SAEs share a deterministic k-means decoder initialization, setting inter-run dictionary distance to zero before training begins. When this initialization is removed, the archetypal constraint provides no stabilization advantage in our setting. We further identify a preprocessing-dependent cosine geometry issue that complicates interpretation of endpoint stability metrics. Overall, our study supports the value of studying SAEs within the larger dictionary-learning tradition while showing that stability claims require trajectory diagnostics and initialization ablations.

AI.tldr: 本文发现Archetypal SAEs声称的稳定性源于跨实验采用相同的初始化设置，而非算法本身的效果。去除这一初始化后，其稳定性优势消失。
AI.motivation: SAE特征在不同随机种子下存在严重的不稳定性问题，影响可解释性研究。作者旨在澄清"稳定性"与"稳定化"两个概念的区别，并检验Archetypal SAEs稳定性声称的真实来源。
AI.method: 分析了Archetypal SAEs的初始化设置（确定性k-means解码器初始化），通过去除该初始化进行对比实验，同时识别了预处理相关的余弦几何问题。
AI.result: Archetypal SAEs的稳定性完全来自确定性初始化，而非其字典学习约束；去除初始化后无任何稳定化优势；存在预处理依赖的余弦几何问题影响稳定性评估。
AI.conclusion: 稳定性（stability）指两个独立训练模型之间的一致性，稳定化（stabilization）指不同初始化运行向共同解的收敛。研究SAE应回归字典学习传统，稳定性声明需要轨迹诊断和初始化消融实验。

title: Planar Symmetric Pattern Generation
summary: Generating objects with specific symmetries is essential in various real-world scenarios. However, adapting existing 2D continuous representations to enforce planar group symmetry remains a challenge, as the transformation of non-reflective group elements may disrupt continuity. To overcome this limitation, we propose a symmetrization framework for arbitrary planar groups. Our method transforms any 2D continuous representation into a symmetric one while preserving continuity. We provide the mathematical formulation of this representation, demonstrate its approximation capability for symmetric functions, and detail the construction methodology. We validate our approach through three visual design tasks (pattern design, paper-cutting design and stylized topology design) and one material design task. Experiments confirm that our representation enables effective symmetry control and demonstrate its broader applicability.

AI.tldr: 提出一种通用对称化框架，能将任意2D连续表示转换为满足平面群对称性的连续表示，并通过多项设计任务验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有2D连续表示难以施加平面群对称性，因为非反射群元素的变换可能破坏连续性，而实际场景中生成具有特定对称性的对象至关重要。
AI.method: 提出一种针对任意平面群的对称化框架，核心是构建一种数学表示，将任意2D连续表示转化为对称且连续的表示，并给出了该表示的数学公式、逼近能力证明及构造方法。
AI.result: 在图案设计、剪纸设计、风格化拓扑设计（视觉设计）和材料设计四项任务中验证了方法的有效性，实现了有效的对称控制并展示了广泛适用性。
AI.conclusion: 该对称化框架能够有效解决2D连续表示中施加平面群对称性的难题，在多项设计任务中表现良好，具有广泛的应用前景。

title: Beyond $\ell_2$-norm and $\ell_\infty$-norm: A Curvature-Inspired $\ell_p$-Norm Scheme for Deep Neural Networks
summary: The existing optimizers for deep neural networks (DNNs) typically rely on either the $\ell_2$ norm or the $\ell_\infty$ norm, resulting in optimizers that do not adapt well to substantial changes in curvature across parameter dimensions. Generally, the training process of DNNs often exhibits strong curvature anisotropy in the early period, whereas in the later period, the training process of DNNs tends to move toward flatter regions with weaker anisotropy. Particularly, optimizers based on the \(\ell_2\)-norm are usually dominated by high-curvature directions, restricting updates of optimizers along with lower curvature direction and thus leading to a slower convergence rate. While optimizers based on the \(\ell_\infty\)-norm are prone to oscillations in flatter regions, due to the coordinate-wise updates of the same magnitude. To address these two extreme cases generated by $\ell_2$ and $\ell_\infty$ norms, we propose a novel $\ell_p$-norm scheme with a dynamical value of $p$ and incorporate it into stochastic gradient descent (SGD) and SGD with momentum (SGDM), leading to two novel optimizers with better generalization performance: ${\ell_p}$-SGD (LPSGD) and ${\ell_p}$-SGDM (LPSGDM). Particularly, the resulting optimizers suppress the dominance of high-curvature directions in the early period by utilizing a large $p$ ($p>2$), followed by a gradual decrease of $p$ toward 2 to enable more stable and refined updates, where the latter process is motivated by the cosine annealing strategy. We establish theoretical guarantees of the resulting algorithms and analyze that both LPSGD and LPSGDM achieve an \(O(T^{-1/2})\) convergence rate for the nonconvex setting. Extensive experiments are conducted on benchmark datasets, including CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and ImageNet-1K, with multiple DNNs such as VGG-11, ResNet-18, and ResNet-50.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于动态 $\ell_p$-范数的优化器 LPSGD 和 LPSGDM，通过在训练早期使用大 $p$ 值抑制高曲率方向主导，后期逐渐减小 $p$ 趋向2以稳定更新，解决了 $\ell_2$ 范数收敛慢和 $\ell_\infty$ 范数振荡的问题，在非凸场景下达到 $O(T^{-1/2})$ 收敛率，并在多个数据集和模型上验证了优越性。
AI.motivation: 现有DNN优化器依赖 $\ell_2$ 或 $\ell_\infty$ 范数，无法适应训练过程中曲率各向异性的剧烈变化：$\ell_2$ 范数在早期被高曲率方向主导，限制低曲率方向更新导致收敛慢；$\ell_\infty$ 范数在后期平坦区域因坐标更新幅度相同而易振荡。需要一种能动态适应不同训练阶段的优化策略。
AI.method: 提出动态 $\ell_p$-范数方案，$p$ 值随训练进程动态调整（早期 $p>2$ 抑制高曲率方向，后期 $p$ 逐步降至2以稳定更新，$p$ 的衰减受余弦退火策略启发）。将 $\ell_p$-范数融入SGD和SGDM，得到LPSGD和LPSGDM两种优化器，并给出非凸场景下 $O(T^{-1/2})$ 收敛率的理论保证。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100、ImageNet-1K数据集上，使用VGG-11、ResNet-18、ResNet-50等模型进行实验，LPSGD和LPSGDM相比基线优化器取得了更好的泛化性能。理论分析证明两种算法在非凸设定下均达到 $O(T^{-1/2})$ 收敛率。
AI.conclusion: 动态 $\ell_p$-范数优化器能有效平衡训练早期的高曲率主导问题和后期的振荡问题，提升DNN训练的收敛速度和泛化性能，理论分析与实验验证均支持该方法的有效性。

title: When Tabular Foundation Models Transfer Across Modalities: A Systematic Evaluation Across 95 Datasets, 7 Modalities, and Two Regimes
comment: 24 pages, 5 figures. Code and data available at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19982636
summary:
We present a single classification pipeline that combines an Equiangular Tight Frame (ETF) preprocessing stage with a tabular foundation model for in-context inference, applied identically across modalities once data is mapped to fixed vector representations. We evaluate it on 95 datasets spanning seven signal modalities -- vision, audio, speech, text, molecular, time-series, and tabular. The main methodological contribution is to fix the comparison object: throughout the paper, performance is judged against the strongest lightweight tuned baseline on the same frozen features, while oracle selection, deployed selection, and specialized fine-tuning are reported separately.
  The pipeline is broadly competitive with strong lightweight tuned baselines on the same frozen features. It does not match the very best specialized models or heavily tuned pipelines on every task, but it stays close, and it runs much faster -- typically 4 to 200 times faster than full backbone fine-tuning, often at comparable quality.
  We describe how to deploy the pipeline in practice: when to apply ETF preprocessing, how to stop its training without a validation split, how to set up the in-context classifier, and how to calibrate the resulting probabilities. The calibration step is non-cosmetic: TabICL produces well-calibrated probabilities by construction, ETF preprocessing initially disrupts that calibration, and the post-hoc rescaling restores it -- yielding a per-prediction confidence signal that practitioners can use as a trust threshold for confidence-gated deployment. We also report where the pipeline should not be expected to help, and how to identify those cases in advance.

AI.tldr: 提出一个统一的分类流程，结合Equiangular Tight Frame (ETF)预处理和表格基础模型进行上下文推理，在95个数据集、7种信号模态上评估，速度比全骨干微调快4-200倍，且质量相当。
AI.motivation: 旨在提供一个跨模态统一的、高效的分类流程，解决现有方法在不同模态需要专门模型和大量调参的问题，同时保持与强基线相当的性能。
AI.method: 构建一个包含ETF预处理阶段和表格基础模型上下文推理的分类流程。数据先映射到固定向量表示，然后通过ETF预处理，最后使用上下文分类器进行推理。还包含后处理校准步骤来恢复ETF预处理破坏的校准性。
AI.result: 在95个数据集上，该流程与强轻量级调优基线表现相当，但速度快4-200倍。校准步骤有效恢复了概率校准性，提供了可用于置信度门控部署的预测置信度信号。
AI.conclusion: 该流程在多数任务上接近最佳专用模型性能但速度快得多，并给出了实际部署建议（何时应用ETF预处理、如何停止训练、如何校准等），同时指出了不适用场景。

title: How Hard Can It Be? Hardness-Aware Multi-Objective Unlearning
summary: Machine unlearning aims to remove the influence of specific forget training data due to privacy, copyright or bias concerns while maintaining the model performance on the remaining retain data. Existing unlearning algorithms, such as optimizing a weighted combination of losses, have tried to achieve these objectives of improving forget quality and maintaining retain utility. However, they do not guarantee that these objectives can be improved by a specified extent for all forget and retain data. In this work, we address this limitation with a novel and theoretically-grounded approach from a constrained optimization perspective. Firstly, we identify that the hardness of reconciling both objectives can be quantified by the similarity between the forget data and the retain data. Next, we derive an unlearning algorithm (HAMU) with the overall goal of guaranteeing a specified improvement in forget quality while minimizing the retain utility cost/degradation by updating the model weights based on our hardness measure. Our hardness measure also informs users when retain utility degradation is unavoidable, i.e., both objectives cannot be improved simultaneously, and stopping should be considered. Our algorithm is applicable to non-convex models and is easily parallelizable, making it readily deployable in real-world scenarios. We empirically demonstrate HAMU's superior performance over baselines on both image and text datasets using large models. Our code is available at https://github.com/aoi3142/HAMU.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于约束优化的机器遗忘算法HAMU，通过量化遗忘数据与保留数据的相似度来保证遗忘质量的同时最小化保留效用损失，并能在无法同时优化两者时提示停止。
AI.motivation: 现有机器遗忘算法（如加权损失组合优化）无法保证在遗忘质量和保留效用上都能达到指定程度的提升，缺乏理论保障和可量化的权衡机制。
AI.method: 从约束优化视角出发，量化遗忘数据与保留数据的相似度作为困难度度量，基于此度量更新模型权重，保证遗忘质量的指定提升同时最小化保留效用损失，适用于非凸模型且可并行化。
AI.result: 在图像和文本数据集上使用大规模模型进行实验，HAMU在遗忘质量和保留效用方面均优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: HAMU提供了一种有理论依据的机器遗忘方法，能够量化权衡遗忘与保留目标，并在无法同时优化时给出停止建议，具备实际部署的可行性。

title: Variational Learning for Insertion-based Generation
summary: Non-monotonic sequence generation methods, such as masked diffusion models, provide a flexible alternative to left-to-right autoregressive modeling by allowing tokens to be generated in non-fixed and prescribed orders. Despite their practical advantages, most existing non-monotonic models are order-agnostic and rely on a fixed-length grid, limiting their ability to support variable-length generation and adaptive insertion order. In this work, we introduce a probabilistic framework for learning insertion order in variable-length insertion models. We formalize a bijective correspondence between insertion trajectories and permutations, which enables an exact reparameterization of the data likelihood as a sum over permutations. Building on this result, we propose the Insertion Process (IP), a stochastic generative model that jointly learns where to insert, what to insert, and when to terminate, trained via permutation-based variational inference. Unlike prior fixed-canvas approaches, IP natively supports variable-length generation and learns data-driven preferences over insertion orders. Experiments on goal-conditioned planning and molecular string generation demonstrate that learning insertion order improves both modeling quality and generalization in domains without a canonical left-to-right structure.

AI.tldr: 本文提出插入过程（Insertion Process），一种可学习插入顺序的变长非单调序列生成模型，通过置换变分推断联合学习插入位置、内容和终止条件，在目标规划与分子生成任务上优于固定顺序方法。
AI.motivation: 现有非单调序列生成方法（如掩码扩散模型）虽灵活，但大多顺序无关且依赖固定长度网格，无法支持变长生成和自适应插入顺序，限制了建模能力。
AI.method: 提出插入过程（IP），建立插入轨迹与置换之间的双射对应关系，将数据似然重参数化为置换求和形式，并通过置换变分推断联合学习插入位置、插入内容和终止条件。
AI.result: 在目标条件规划和分子字符串生成任务上，学习插入顺序在建模质量和泛化能力上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 学习插入顺序能有效提升非单调序列生成模型的性能，尤其在缺乏规范从左到右结构的数据上表现突出。

title: Rethinking Evaluation Paradigms in IBP-based Certified Training
summary: Deep neural networks achieve strong performance on many supervised learning tasks but remain vulnerable to adversarial perturbations. Neural network verification provides mathematically rigorous robustness guarantees, yet at substantial computational cost. To mitigate this, certified training techniques optimise for verifiable robustness during training, typically inducing a trade-off between natural and certified accuracy controlled by method-specific hyperparameters. Because these metrics are inherently conflicting, the common practice of reporting a single configuration is problematic: it can mislead conclusions about overall performance and prevents unbiased assessments of the state of the art. We address this by evaluating certified training methods via Pareto front comparisons over the natural--certified accuracy trade-off. To enable fair, method-agnostic comparisons, we perform efficient automated multi-objective hyperparameter optimisation to identify a set of Pareto-optimal configurations for each method. This approach often uncovers substantial undertuning in previously reported configurations, yielding superior performance and establishing a new state of the art. Leveraging these fronts, we present the first comprehensive multi-objective comparison of certified training approaches, showing that prior advancements are less pronounced than assumed and revealing previously unreported performance complementarities.

AI.tldr: 本文针对认证训练方法中自然准确率与认证准确率之间的权衡问题，提出使用帕累托前沿进行多目标比较，通过自动超参数优化发现先前配置存在严重欠调优，并建立了新的最优结果。
AI.motivation: 现有认证训练方法报告单一配置容易误导结论，无法公平评估不同方法的实际表现，需要一种更全面、无偏的比较方式。
AI.method: 采用帕累托前沿（Pareto front）比较各认证训练方法在自然准确率与认证准确率之间的权衡，并进行高效的自动化多目标超参数优化来寻找每个方法的帕累托最优配置集合。
AI.result: 发现许多方法先前报告的配置存在严重欠调优；通过帕累托优化获得了更优性能并建立了新的最优结果；先前方法之间的性能差异并不如假设中那明显，并发现了之前未报告的互补性。
AI.conclusion: 使用帕累托前沿进行多目标比较比单一指标报告更公平、更全面，能够揭示真实的方法性能差异和互补关系。

title: Edge-aware Decoding for Neural Asymmetric Routing
summary: Neural asymmetric routing models increasingly encode directionality through matrix representations and asymmetry-aware attention. The final routing action, however, is not a node in isolation but a directed transition chosen under the current partial route. This creates a representation--decision mismatch: pairwise cost information may be encoded upstream while the final candidate logit is still largely parameterized as context--node compatibility. We propose a decoder-design principle for neural asymmetric routing: the final score should explicitly expose transition-level quantities suggested by the problem's cost-to-go structure.
